authors_text: Clément L. Canonne,Ayush Jain,Gautam Kamath,Jerry Li
title: The Price of Tolerance in Distribution Testing
title_zh: 分布测试中容差的代价
comment: Added a result on instance-optimal testing, and further discussion in the introduction
comments: Added a result on instance-optimal testing, and further discussion in the introduction
abstract: We revisit the problem of tolerant distribution testing. That is, given samples from an unknown distribution $p$ over $\{1, \dots, n\}$, is it $\varepsilon_1$-close to or $\varepsilon_2$-far from a reference distribution $q$ (in total variation distance)? Despite significant interest over the past decade, this problem is well understood only in the extreme cases. In the noiseless setting (i.e., $\varepsilon_1 = 0$) the sample complexity is $Θ(\sqrt{n})$, strongly sublinear in the domain size. At the other end of the spectrum, when $\varepsilon_1 = \varepsilon_2/2$, the sample complexity jumps to the barely sublinear $Θ(n/\log n)$. However, very little is known about the intermediate regime. We fully characterize the price of tolerance in distribution testing as a function of $n$, $\varepsilon_1$, $\varepsilon_2$, up to a single $\log n$ factor. Specifically, we show the sample complexity to be \[\tilde Θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{n}}{\varepsilon_2^{2}} + \frac{n}{\log n} \cdot \max \left\{\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2},\left(\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2}\right)^{\!\!2}\right\}\right),\] providing a smooth tradeoff between the two previously known cases. We also provide a similar characterization for the problem of tolerant equivalence testing, where both $p$ and $q$ are unknown. Surprisingly, in both cases, the main quantity dictating the sample complexity is the ratio $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2^2$, and not the more intuitive $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2$. Of particular technical interest is our lower bound framework, which involves novel approximation-theoretic tools required to handle the asymmetry between $\varepsilon_1$ and $\varepsilon_2$, a challenge absent from previous works.

abstract_zh: 我们重新审视容忍分布测试的问题。也就是说，给定来自 $\{1, \dots, n\}$ 上的未知分布 $p$ 的样本，它是 $\varepsilon_1$- 接近还是 $\varepsilon_2$- 远离参考分布 $q$（总变化距离）？尽管过去十年人们对这个问题产生了浓厚的兴趣，但只有在极端情况下才能很好地理解这个问题。在无噪声设置（即 $\varepsilon_1 = 0$）中，样本复杂度为 $θ(\sqrt{n})$，域大小呈强烈次线性。在频谱的另一端，当 $\varepsilon_1 = \varepsilon_2/2$ 时，样本复杂度跃升至勉强次线性的 $θ(n/\log n)$。然而，人们对中间制度知之甚少。我们将分布测试中的公差价格完全描述为 $n$、$\varepsilon_1$、$\varepsilon_2$ 的函数，直至单个 $\log n$ 因子。具体来说，我们将样本复杂度表示为 \[\tilde θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{n}}{\varepsilon_2^{2}} + \frac{n}{\log n} \cdot \max \left\{\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2},\left(\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2}\right)^{\!\!2}\right\}\right),\] 提供两种先前已知情况之间的平滑权衡。我们还为容忍等价测试问题提供了类似的表征，其中 $p$ 和 $q$ 都是未知的。令人惊讶的是，在这两种情况下，决定样本复杂度的主要量是比率 $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2^2$，而不是更直观的 $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2$。特别具有技术意义的是我们的下界框架，它涉及处理 $\varepsilon_1$ 和 $\varepsilon_2$ 之间的不对称性所需的新颖的近似理论工具，这是以前的工作中没有的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了容忍分布测试问题，旨在确定在给定未知分布与参考分布的总变差距离接近或远离时所需的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 尽管过去十年对分布测试有广泛研究，但容忍测试的中间情况（非极端噪声或完全无噪声场景）仍缺乏理论支持，需明确样本复杂度与容忍参数的关系。
AI.method: 通过构建新的近似理论工具，设计下界分析框架，处理ε₁与ε₂的不对称性，并结合已知极端情况推导出统一的样本复杂度表达式。
AI.result: 得出样本复杂度的精确表征：$\	ilde{Θ}\\left(\ rac{\\sqrt{n}}{\\varepsilon_2^2} + \ rac{n}{\\log n} \\cdot \\max\\left\\{\ rac{\\varepsilon_1}{\\varepsilon_2^2}, \\left(\ rac{\\varepsilon_1}{\\varepsilon_2^2}\ight)^2\ight\\}\ight)$，揭示ε₁/ε₂²而非ε₁/ε₂是核心影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 容忍分布测试的样本复杂度由ε₁/ε₂²主导，新框架填补了中间区域的理论空白，并为双未知分布等扩展问题提供了类似表征。

search_text: The Price of Tolerance in Distribution Testing 分布测试中容差的代价 We revisit the problem of tolerant distribution testing. That is, given samples from an unknown distribution $p$ over $\{1, \dots, n\}$, is it $\varepsilon_1$-close to or $\varepsilon_2$-far from a reference distribution $q$ (in total variation distance)? Despite significant interest over the past decade, this problem is well understood only in the extreme cases. In the noiseless setting (i.e., $\varepsilon_1 = 0$) the sample complexity is $Θ(\sqrt{n})$, strongly sublinear in the domain size. At the other end of the spectrum, when $\varepsilon_1 = \varepsilon_2/2$, the sample complexity jumps to the barely sublinear $Θ(n/\log n)$. However, very little is known about the intermediate regime. We fully characterize the price of tolerance in distribution testing as a function of $n$, $\varepsilon_1$, $\varepsilon_2$, up to a single $\log n$ factor. Specifically, we show the sample complexity to be \[\tilde Θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{n}}{\varepsilon_2^{2}} + \frac{n}{\log n} \cdot \max \left\{\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2},\left(\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2}\right)^{\!\!2}\right\}\right),\] providing a smooth tradeoff between the two previously known cases. We also provide a similar characterization for the problem of tolerant equivalence testing, where both $p$ and $q$ are unknown. Surprisingly, in both cases, the main quantity dictating the sample complexity is the ratio $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2^2$, and not the more intuitive $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2$. Of particular technical interest is our lower bound framework, which involves novel approximation-theoretic tools required to handle the asymmetry between $\varepsilon_1$ and $\varepsilon_2$, a challenge absent from previous works. 我们重新审视容忍分布测试的问题。也就是说，给定来自 $\{1, \dots, n\}$ 上的未知分布 $p$ 的样本，它是 $\varepsilon_1$- 接近还是 $\varepsilon_2$- 远离参考分布 $q$（总变化距离）？尽管过去十年人们对这个问题产生了浓厚的兴趣，但只有在极端情况下才能很好地理解这个问题。在无噪声设置（即 $\varepsilon_1 = 0$）中，样本复杂度为 $θ(\sqrt{n})$，域大小呈强烈次线性。在频谱的另一端，当 $\varepsilon_1 = \varepsilon_2/2$ 时，样本复杂度跃升至勉强次线性的 $θ(n/\log n)$。然而，人们对中间制度知之甚少。我们将分布测试中的公差价格完全描述为 $n$、$\varepsilon_1$、$\varepsilon_2$ 的函数，直至单个 $\log n$ 因子。具体来说，我们将样本复杂度表示为 \[\tilde θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{n}}{\varepsilon_2^{2}} + \frac{n}{\log n} \cdot \max \left\{\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2},\left(\frac{\varepsilon_1}{\varepsilon_2^2}\right)^{\!\!2}\right\}\right),\] 提供两种先前已知情况之间的平滑权衡。我们还为容忍等价测试问题提供了类似的表征，其中 $p$ 和 $q$ 都是未知的。令人惊讶的是，在这两种情况下，决定样本复杂度的主要量是比率 $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2^2$，而不是更直观的 $\varepsilon_1/\varepsilon_2$。特别具有技术意义的是我们的下界框架，它涉及处理 $\varepsilon_1$ 和 $\varepsilon_2$ 之间的不对称性所需的新颖的近似理论工具，这是以前的工作中没有的挑战。 本文研究了容忍分布测试问题，旨在确定在给定未知分布与参考分布的总变差距离接近或远离时所需的样本复杂度。 Clément L. authors_text: Zhipeng Bao,Martial Hebert,Yu-Xiong Wang
title: Generative Modeling for Multi-task Visual Learning
title_zh: 多任务视觉学习的生成建模
abstract: Generative modeling has recently shown great promise in computer vision, but it has mostly focused on synthesizing visually realistic images. In this paper, motivated by multi-task learning of shareable feature representations, we consider a novel problem of learning a shared generative model that is useful across various visual perception tasks. Correspondingly, we propose a general multi-task oriented generative modeling (MGM) framework, by coupling a discriminative multi-task network with a generative network. While it is challenging to synthesize both RGB images and pixel-level annotations in multi-task scenarios, our framework enables us to use synthesized images paired with only weak annotations (i.e., image-level scene labels) to facilitate multiple visual tasks. Experimental evaluation on challenging multi-task benchmarks, including NYUv2 and Taskonomy, demonstrates that our MGM framework improves the performance of all the tasks by large margins, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art multi-task approaches.
summary: Generative modeling has recently shown great promise in computer vision, but it has mostly focused on synthesizing visually realistic images. In this paper, motivated by multi-task learning of shareable feature representations, we consider a novel problem of learning a shared generative model that is useful across various visual perception tasks. Correspondingly, we propose a general multi-task oriented generative modeling (MGM) framework, by coupling a discriminative multi-task network with a generative network. While it is challenging to synthesize both RGB images and pixel-level annotations in multi-task scenarios, our framework enables us to use synthesized images paired with only weak annotations (i.e., image-level scene labels) to facilitate multiple visual tasks. Experimental evaluation on challenging multi-task benchmarks, including NYUv2 and Taskonomy, demonstrates that our MGM framework improves the performance of all the tasks by large margins, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art multi-task approaches.
abstract_zh: 生成建模最近在计算机视觉领域展现出了巨大的前景，但它主要集中在合成视觉逼真的图像上。在本文中，受可共享特征表示的多任务学习的启发，我们考虑了一个学习共享生成模型的新问题，该模型在各种视觉感知任务中都很有用。相应地，我们通过将判别性多任务网络与生成网络耦合，提出了一种通用的面向多任务的生成建模（MGM）框架。虽然在多任务场景中合成 RGB 图像和像素级注释具有挑战性，但我们的框架使我们能够使用仅与弱注释（即图像级场景标签）配对的合成图像来促进多个视觉任务。对具有挑战性的多任务基准（包括 NYUv2 和 Taskonomy）的实验评估表明，我们的 MGM 框架大幅提高了所有任务的性能，始终优于最先进的多任务方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务导向的生成模型（MGM）框架，通过共享生成模型提升多任务视觉学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型主要聚焦于生成逼真图像，而多任务学习中缺乏跨任务共享的生成模型研究，限制了多任务性能的提升。
AI.method: 设计MGM框架，结合判别多任务网络与生成网络，利用弱标注（如场景标签）生成图像以辅助多任务学习。
AI.result: 在NYUv2和Taskonomy等基准测试中，MGM显著优于现有方法，所有任务性能均有大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: MGM框架验证了共享生成模型在多任务视觉学习中的有效性，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Ha-Thanh Nguyen,Vu Tran,Phuong Minh Nguyen,Thi-Hai-Yen Vuong,Quan Minh Bui,Chau Minh Nguyen,Binh Tran Dang,Minh Le Nguyen,Ken Satoh
title: ParaLaw Nets -- Cross-lingual Sentence-level Pretraining for Legal Text Processing
title_zh: ParaLaw Nets——法律文本处理的跨语言句子级预训练
comment: Also published in COLIEE 2021's Proceeding
comments: Also published in COLIEE 2021's Proceeding
abstract: Ambiguity is a characteristic of natural language, which makes expression ideas flexible. However, in a domain that requires accurate statements, it becomes a barrier. Specifically, a single word can have many meanings and multiple words can have the same meaning. When translating a text into a foreign language, the translator needs to determine the exact meaning of each element in the original sentence to produce the correct translation sentence. From that observation, in this paper, we propose ParaLaw Nets, a pretrained model family using sentence-level cross-lingual information to reduce ambiguity and increase the performance in legal text processing. This approach achieved the best result in the Question Answering task of COLIEE-2021.
summary: Ambiguity is a characteristic of natural language, which makes expression ideas flexible. However, in a domain that requires accurate statements, it becomes a barrier. Specifically, a single word can have many meanings and multiple words can have the same meaning. When translating a text into a foreign language, the translator needs to determine the exact meaning of each element in the original sentence to produce the correct translation sentence. From that observation, in this paper, we propose ParaLaw Nets, a pretrained model family using sentence-level cross-lingual information to reduce ambiguity and increase the performance in legal text processing. This approach achieved the best result in the Question Answering task of COLIEE-2021.
abstract_zh: 歧义性是自然语言的一个特性，这使得表达思想变得灵活。然而，在需要准确陈述的领域，它就成为了障碍。具体来说，单个单词可以有多种含义，多个单词可以具有相同的含义。将文本翻译成外语时，译者需要确定原句子中每个元素的确切含义，以产生正确的翻译句子。根据这一观察，在本文中，我们提出了 ParaLaw Nets，这是一个预训练的模型系列，使用句子级跨语言信息来减少歧义并提高法律文本处理的性能。该方法在 COLIEE-2021 的问答任务中取得了最好的结果。

AI.result: 在COLIEE-2021法律问答任务中取得最佳性能，验证了模型在跨语言法律文本处理中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言句子级预训练能有效缓解法律文本歧义，为多语言法律NLP任务提供高性能解决方案。

search_text: ParaLaw Nets -- Cross-lingual Sentence-level Pretraining for Legal Text Processing ParaLaw Nets——法律文本处理的跨语言句子级预训练 Ambiguity is a characteristic of natural language, which makes expression ideas flexible. However, in a domain that requires accurate statements, it becomes a barrier. Specifically, a single word can have many meanings and multiple words can have the same meaning. When translating a text into a foreign language, the translator needs to determine the exact meaning of each element in the original sentence to produce the correct translation sentence. From that observation, in this paper, we propose ParaLaw Nets, a pretrained model family using sentence-level cross-lingual information to reduce ambiguity and increase the performance in legal text processing. authors_text: Alessandro Sordoni,Nouha Dziri,Hannes Schulz,Geoff Gordon,Phil Bachman,Remi Tachet
title: Decomposed Mutual Information Estimation for Contrastive Representation Learning
title_zh: 对比表示学习的分解互信息估计
comment: ICML 2021
comments: ICML 2021
abstract: Recent contrastive representation learning methods rely on estimating mutual information (MI) between multiple views of an underlying context. E.g., we can derive multiple views of a given image by applying data augmentation, or we can split a sequence into views comprising the past and future of some step in the sequence. Contrastive lower bounds on MI are easy to optimize, but have a strong underestimation bias when estimating large amounts of MI. We propose decomposing the full MI estimation problem into a sum of smaller estimation problems by splitting one of the views into progressively more informed subviews and by applying the chain rule on MI between the decomposed views. This expression contains a sum of unconditional and conditional MI terms, each measuring modest chunks of the total MI, which facilitates approximation via contrastive bounds. To maximize the sum, we formulate a contrastive lower bound on the conditional MI which can be approximated efficiently. We refer to our general approach as Decomposed Estimation of Mutual Information (DEMI). We show that DEMI can capture a larger amount of MI than standard non-decomposed contrastive bounds in a synthetic setting, and learns better representations in a vision domain and for dialogue generation.
summary: Recent contrastive representation learning methods rely on estimating mutual information (MI) between multiple views of an underlying context. E.g., we can derive multiple views of a given image by applying data augmentation, or we can split a sequence into views comprising the past and future of some step in the sequence. Contrastive lower bounds on MI are easy to optimize, but have a strong underestimation bias when estimating large amounts of MI. We propose decomposing the full MI estimation problem into a sum of smaller estimation problems by splitting one of the views into progressively more informed subviews and by applying the chain rule on MI between the decomposed views. This expression contains a sum of unconditional and conditional MI terms, each measuring modest chunks of the total MI, which facilitates approximation via contrastive bounds. To maximize the sum, we formulate a contrastive lower bound on the conditional MI which can be approximated efficiently. We refer to our general approach as Decomposed Estimation of Mutual Information (DEMI). We show that DEMI can capture a larger amount of MI than standard non-decomposed contrastive bounds in a synthetic setting, and learns better representations in a vision domain and for dialogue generation.
abstract_zh: 最近的对比表示学习方法依赖于估计底层上下文的多个视图之间的互信息（MI）。例如，我们可以通过应用数据增强来导出给定图像的多个视图，或者我们可以将序列拆分为包含序列中某个步骤的过去和未来的视图。 MI 的对比下限很容易优化，但在估计大量 MI 时会出现强烈的低估偏差。我们建议通过将视图之一拆分为逐渐更明智的子视图并在分解视图之间应用 MI 的链式规则，将完整的 MI 估计问题分解为较小的估计问题的总和。该表达式包含无条件和条件 MI 项的总和，每个项测量总 MI 的适度块，这有助于通过对比边界进行近似。为了最大化总和，我们在条件 MI 上制定了一个可以有效近似的对比下界。我们将我们的通用方法称为互信息分解估计（DEMI）。我们证明，在合成环境中，DEMI 可以捕获比标准非分解对比边界更多的 MI，并在视觉领域和对话生成中学习更好的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分解互信息估计（DEMI）方法，通过将互信息分解为更小的子问题来改进对比表示学习中的互信息估计。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在估计大量互信息时存在严重低估偏差，需更精确的估计方式以提升表示学习效果。
AI.method: 将完整互信息分解为条件与无条件互信息项之和，利用链式法则并设计对比下界优化目标，通过逐步细化视角实现高效估计。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和视觉领域任务中，DEMI相比传统方法能捕捉更多互信息并学习到更优的表示。
AI.conclusion: 分解估计框架有效缓解了互信息低估问题，为对比学习提供了更准确的优化目标。

authors_text: Youjia Zhou,Methun Kamruzzaman,Patrick Schnable,Bala Krishnamoorthy,Ananth Kalyanaraman,Bei Wang
title: Pheno-Mapper: An Interactive Toolbox for the Visual Exploration of Phenomics Data
title_zh: Pheno-Mapper：用于表型组数据可视化探索的交互式工具箱
comment: This is a preprint version. For a published version, please refer to ACM DOI: 10.1145/3459930.3469511
comments: This is a preprint version. For a published version, please refer to ACM DOI: 10.1145/3459930.3469511
abstract: High-throughput technologies to collect field data have made observations possible at scale in several branches of life sciences. The data collected can range from the molecular level (genotypes) to physiological (phenotypic traits) and environmental observations (e.g., weather, soil conditions). These vast swathes of data, collectively referred to as phenomics data, represent a treasure trove of key scientific knowledge on the dynamics of the underlying biological system. However, extracting information and insights from these complex datasets remains a significant challenge owing to their multidimensionality and lack of prior knowledge about their complex structure. In this paper, we present Pheno-Mapper, an interactive toolbox for the exploratory analysis and visualization of large-scale phenomics data. Our approach uses the mapper framework to perform a topological analysis of the data, and subsequently render visual representations with built-in data analysis and machine learning capabilities. We demonstrate the utility of this new tool on real-world plant (e.g., maize) phenomics datasets. In comparison to existing approaches, the main advantage of Pheno-Mapper is that it provides rich, interactive capabilities in the exploratory analysis of phenomics data, and it integrates visual analytics with data analysis and machine learning in an easily extensible way. In particular, Pheno-Mapper allows the interactive selection of subpopulations guided by a topological summary of the data and applies data mining and machine learning to these selected subpopulations for in-depth exploration.
summary: High-throughput technologies to collect field data have made observations possible at scale in several branches of life sciences. The data collected can range from the molecular level (genotypes) to physiological (phenotypic traits) and environmental observations (e.g., weather, soil conditions). These vast swathes of data, collectively referred to as phenomics data, represent a treasure trove of key scientific knowledge on the dynamics of the underlying biological system. However, extracting information and insights from these complex datasets remains a significant challenge owing to their multidimensionality and lack of prior knowledge about their complex structure. In this paper, we present Pheno-Mapper, an interactive toolbox for the exploratory analysis and visualization of large-scale phenomics data. Our approach uses the mapper framework to perform a topological analysis of the data, and subsequently render visual representations with built-in data analysis and machine learning capabilities. We demonstrate the utility of this new tool on real-world plant (e.g., maize) phenomics datasets. In comparison to existing approaches, the main advantage of Pheno-Mapper is that it provides rich, interactive capabilities in the exploratory analysis of phenomics data, and it integrates visual analytics with data analysis and machine learning in an easily extensible way. In particular, Pheno-Mapper allows the interactive selection of subpopulations guided by a topological summary of the data and applies data mining and machine learning to these selected subpopulations for in-depth exploration.
abstract_zh: 收集现场数据的高通量技术使得生命科学多个分支的大规模观测成为可能。收集的数据范围从分子水平（基因型）到生理（表型性状）和环境观察（例如天气、土壤条件）。这些大量数据统称为表型组学数据，代表了有关基础生物系统动力学的关键科学知识的宝库。然而，由于这些复杂数据集的多维性以及缺乏对其复杂结构的先验知识，从这些复杂数据集中提取信息和见解仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 Pheno-Mapper，这是一个用于大规模表型组数据探索性分析和可视化的交互式工具箱。我们的方法使用映射器框架对数据进行拓扑分析，然后使用内置数据分析和机器学习功能呈现视觉表示。我们展示了这种新工具在现实世界植物（例如玉米）表型组数据集上的实用性。与现有方法相比，Pheno-Mapper 的主要优势在于它在表型组数据的探索性分析中提供了丰富的交互功能，并且以易于扩展的方式将可视化分析与数据分析和机器学习集成在一起。特别是，Pheno-Mapper 允许在数据的拓扑摘要的指导下交互式选择子群，并将数据挖掘和机器学习应用于这些选定的子群以进行深入探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pheno-Mapper工具，用于通过可视化和机器学习技术探索大规模表型组学数据。
AI.motivation: 表型组学数据具有多维性和复杂性，现有方法难以有效提取信息，需交互式工具辅助分析。
AI.method: 基于Mapper框架进行拓扑分析，结合可视化与机器学习技术，支持交互式子群体选择与深度挖掘。
AI.result: 在实际植物（如玉米）表型数据集上验证，证明其相比现有方法具有更丰富的交互分析能力。
AI.conclusion: Pheno-Mapper通过整合可视化分析与机器学习，为表型组学数据探索提供了可扩展的交互式解决方案。

These vast swathes of data, collectively referred to as phenomics data, represent a treasure trove of key scientific knowledge on the dynamics of the underlying biological system. However, extracting information and insights from these complex datasets remains a significant challenge owing to their multidimensionality and lack of prior knowledge about their complex structure. In this paper, we present Pheno-Mapper, an interactive toolbox for the exploratory analysis and visualization of large-scale phenomics data. Our approach uses the mapper framework to perform a topological analysis of the data, and subsequently render visual representations with built-in data analysis and machine learning capabilities. We demonstrate the utility of this new tool on real-world plant (e.g., maize) phenomics datasets. In comparison to existing approaches, the main advantage of Pheno-Mapper is that it provides rich, interactive capabilities in the exploratory analysis of phenomics data, and it integrates visual analytics with data analysis and machine learning in an easily extensible way. In particular, Pheno-Mapper allows the interactive selection of subpopulations guided by a topological summary of the data and applies data mining and machine learning to these selected subpopulations for in-depth exploration. 收集现场数据的高通量技术使得生命科学多个分支的大规模观测成为可能。收集的数据范围从分子水平（基因型）到生理（表型性状）和环境观察（例如天气、土壤条件）。这些大量数据统称为表型组学数据，代表了有关基础生物系统动力学的关键科学知识的宝库。然而，由于这些复杂数据集的多维性以及缺乏对其复杂结构的先验知识，从这些复杂数据集中提取信息和见解仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 Pheno-Mapper，这是一个用于大规模表型组数据探索性分析和可视化的交互式工具箱。我们的方法使用映射器框架对数据进行拓扑分析，然后使用内置数据分析和机器学习功能呈现视觉表示。我们展示了这种新工具在现实世界植物（例如玉米）表型组数据集上的实用性。与现有方法相比，Pheno-Mapper 的主要优势在于它在表型组数据的探索性分析中提供了丰富的交互功能，并且以易于扩展的方式将可视化分析与数据分析和机器学习集成在一起。特别是，Pheno-Mapper 允许在数据的拓扑摘要的指导下交互式选择子群，并将数据挖掘和机器学习应用于这些选定的子群以进行深入探索。 本文提出Pheno-Mapper工具，用于通过可视化和机器学习技术探索大规模表型组学数据。 Youjia Zhou,Methun Kamruzzaman,Patrick Schnable,Bala Krishnamoorthy,Ananth Kalyanaraman,Bei Wang cs.CG,cs.HC,math.AT,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Cheng Zhang,Pan Gao
title: Countering Adversarial Examples: Combining Input Transformation and Noisy Training
title_zh: 对抗对抗性例子：结合输入转换和噪声训练
abstract: Recent studies have shown that neural network (NN) based image classifiers are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples, which poses a threat to security-sensitive image recognition task. Prior work has shown that JPEG compression can combat the drop in classification accuracy on adversarial examples to some extent. But, as the compression ratio increases, traditional JPEG compression is insufficient to defend those attacks but can cause an abrupt accuracy decline to the benign images. In this paper, with the aim of fully filtering the adversarial perturbations, we firstly make modifications to traditional JPEG compression algorithm which becomes more favorable for NN. Specifically, based on an analysis of the frequency coefficient, we design a NN-favored quantization table for compression. Considering compression as a data augmentation strategy, we then combine our model-agnostic preprocess with noisy training. We fine-tune the pre-trained model by training with images encoded at different compression levels, thus generating multiple classifiers. Finally, since lower (higher) compression ratio can remove both perturbations and original features slightly (aggressively), we use these trained multiple models for model ensemble. The majority vote of the ensemble of models is adopted as final predictions. Experiments results show our method can improve defense efficiency while maintaining original accuracy.
summary: Recent studies have shown that neural network (NN) based image classifiers are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples, which poses a threat to security-sensitive image recognition task. Prior work has shown that JPEG compression can combat the drop in classification accuracy on adversarial examples to some extent. But, as the compression ratio increases, traditional JPEG compression is insufficient to defend those attacks but can cause an abrupt accuracy decline to the benign images. In this paper, with the aim of fully filtering the adversarial perturbations, we firstly make modifications to traditional JPEG compression algorithm which becomes more favorable for NN. Specifically, based on an analysis of the frequency coefficient, we design a NN-favored quantization table for compression. Considering compression as a data augmentation strategy, we then combine our model-agnostic preprocess with noisy training. We fine-tune the pre-trained model by training with images encoded at different compression levels, thus generating multiple classifiers. Finally, since lower (higher) compression ratio can remove both perturbations and original features slightly (aggressively), we use these trained multiple models for model ensemble. The majority vote of the ensemble of models is adopted as final predictions. Experiments results show our method can improve defense efficiency while maintaining original accuracy.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于神经网络（NN）的图像分类器非常容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这对安全敏感的图像识别任务构成了威胁。先前的工作表明，JPEG 压缩可以在一定程度上解决对抗样本分类精度下降的问题。但是，随着压缩率的增加，传统的 JPEG 压缩不足以防御这些攻击，反而会导致良性图像的准确性突然下降。在本文中，为了充分过滤对抗性扰动，我们首先对传统的 JPEG 压缩算法进行修改，使其变得更有利于神经网络。具体来说，基于对频率系数的分析，我们设计了一种适合神经网络的压缩量化表。将压缩视为一种数据增强策略，然后我们将与模型无关的预处理与噪声训练结合起来。我们通过使用不同压缩级别编码的图像进行训练来微调预训练模型，从而生成多个分类器。最后，由于较低（较高）的压缩比可以稍微（积极地）去除扰动和原始特征，因此我们使用这些经过训练的多个模型进行模型集成。采用模型集合的多数票作为最终预测。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在保持原有精度的同时提高防御效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合输入变换和噪声训练的方法，以更有效地防御对抗样本攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统JPEG压缩虽能部分缓解对抗样本问题，但高压缩比会导致良性图像准确率骤降，需改进压缩算法并结合其他防御策略。
AI.method: 设计神经网络友好的量化表优化JPEG压缩，将其作为数据增强策略，结合噪声训练训练多模型，并通过模型集成进行多数投票预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在提升防御效率的同时保持了原始分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进压缩算法与模型集成，可有效过滤对抗扰动并维持模型性能。

authors_text: Wanqing Xie,Lizhong Liang,Yao Lu,Chen Wang,Jihong Shen,Hui Luo,Xiaofeng Liu
title: Interpreting Depression From Question-wise Long-term Video Recording of SDS Evaluation
title_zh: 从 SDS 评估的问题式长期视频记录中解读抑郁症
comment: Published in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
comments: Published in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
abstract: Self-Rating Depression Scale (SDS) questionnaire has frequently been used for efficient depression preliminary screening. However, the uncontrollable self-administered measure can be easily affected by insouciantly or deceptively answering, and producing the different results with the clinician-administered Hamilton Depression Rating Scale (HDRS) and the final diagnosis. Clinically, facial expression (FE) and actions play a vital role in clinician-administered evaluation, while FE and action are underexplored for self-administered evaluations. In this work, we collect a novel dataset of 200 subjects to evidence the validity of self-rating questionnaires with their corresponding question-wise video recording. To automatically interpret depression from the SDS evaluation and the paired video, we propose an end-to-end hierarchical framework for the long-term variable-length video, which is also conditioned on the questionnaire results and the answering time. Specifically, we resort to a hierarchical model which utilizes a 3D CNN for local temporal pattern exploration and a redundancy-aware self-attention (RAS) scheme for question-wise global feature aggregation. Targeting for the redundant long-term FE video processing, our RAS is able to effectively exploit the correlations of each video clip within a question set to emphasize the discriminative information and eliminate the redundancy based on feature pair-wise affinity. Then, the question-wise video feature is concatenated with the questionnaire scores for final depression detection. Our thorough evaluations also show the validity of fusing SDS evaluation and its video recording, and the superiority of our framework to the conventional state-of-the-art temporal modeling methods.
summary: Self-Rating Depression Scale (SDS) questionnaire has frequently been used for efficient depression preliminary screening. However, the uncontrollable self-administered measure can be easily affected by insouciantly or deceptively answering, and producing the different results with the clinician-administered Hamilton Depression Rating Scale (HDRS) and the final diagnosis. Clinically, facial expression (FE) and actions play a vital role in clinician-administered evaluation, while FE and action are underexplored for self-administered evaluations. In this work, we collect a novel dataset of 200 subjects to evidence the validity of self-rating questionnaires with their corresponding question-wise video recording. To automatically interpret depression from the SDS evaluation and the paired video, we propose an end-to-end hierarchical framework for the long-term variable-length video, which is also conditioned on the questionnaire results and the answering time. Specifically, we resort to a hierarchical model which utilizes a 3D CNN for local temporal pattern exploration and a redundancy-aware self-attention (RAS) scheme for question-wise global feature aggregation. Targeting for the redundant long-term FE video processing, our RAS is able to effectively exploit the correlations of each video clip within a question set to emphasize the discriminative information and eliminate the redundancy based on feature pair-wise affinity. Then, the question-wise video feature is concatenated with the questionnaire scores for final depression detection. Our thorough evaluations also show the validity of fusing SDS evaluation and its video recording, and the superiority of our framework to the conventional state-of-the-art temporal modeling methods.
abstract_zh: 抑郁自评量表（SDS）问卷经常被用于有效的抑郁症初步筛查。然而，无法控制的自我测量很容易受到漫不经心或欺骗性回答的影响，并与临床医生使用的汉密尔顿抑郁量表（HDRS）和最终诊断产生不同的结果。临床上，面部表情 (FE) 和动作在临床医生进行的评估中发挥着至关重要的作用，而 FE 和动作在自我评估中尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们收集了 200 名受试者的新颖数据集，以证明自评问卷及其相应的问题视频记录的有效性。为了从 SDS 评估和配对视频中自动解释抑郁症，我们提出了一个针对长期可变长度视频的端到端分层框架，该框架也以问卷结果和回答时间为条件。具体来说，我们采用分层模型，该模型利用 3D CNN 进行局部时间模式探索，并利用冗余感知自注意力 (RAS) 方案进行问题式全局特征聚合。针对冗余的长期 FE 视频处理，我们的 RAS 能够有效地利用问题集中每个视频片段的相关性来强调判别信息并消除基于特征成对亲和力的冗余。然后，将问题视频特征与问卷分数连接起来，以进行最终的抑郁症检测。我们的全面评估还显示了融合 SDS 评估及其视频记录的有效性，以及我们的框架相对于传统最先进的时间建模方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合SDS自评量表与视频记录的框架，用于自动解读抑郁症状。
AI.motivation: 自评SDS量表易受被试者主观因素影响，与临床HDRS评分存在差异，而面部表情和行为在临床评估中至关重要，但未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建端到端分层框架，采用3D CNN提取局部时序特征，结合冗余感知自注意力机制（RAS）进行全局特征聚合，并融合问卷评分与视频特征进行抑郁检测。
AI.result: 实验验证了SDS问卷与视频数据融合的有效性，且所提框架优于传统时序建模方法。
AI.conclusion: 视频分析与SDS量表结合可提升抑郁筛查准确性，所提方法在长时序视频处理中表现优越。

Our thorough evaluations also show the validity of fusing SDS evaluation and its video recording, and the superiority of our framework to the conventional state-of-the-art temporal modeling methods. 抑郁自评量表（SDS）问卷经常被用于有效的抑郁症初步筛查。然而，无法控制的自我测量很容易受到漫不经心或欺骗性回答的影响，并与临床医生使用的汉密尔顿抑郁量表（HDRS）和最终诊断产生不同的结果。临床上，面部表情 (FE) 和动作在临床医生进行的评估中发挥着至关重要的作用，而 FE 和动作在自我评估中尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们收集了 200 名受试者的新颖数据集，以证明自评问卷及其相应的问题视频记录的有效性。为了从 SDS 评估和配对视频中自动解释抑郁症，我们提出了一个针对长期可变长度视频的端到端分层框架，该框架也以问卷结果和回答时间为条件。具体来说，我们采用分层模型，该模型利用 3D CNN 进行局部时间模式探索，并利用冗余感知自注意力 (RAS) 方案进行问题式全局特征聚合。针对冗余的长期 FE 视频处理，我们的 RAS 能够有效地利用问题集中每个视频片段的相关性来强调判别信息并消除基于特征成对亲和力的冗余。然后，将问题视频特征与问卷分数连接起来，以进行最终的抑郁症检测。我们的全面评估还显示了融合 SDS 评估及其视频记录的有效性，以及我们的框架相对于传统最先进的时间建模方法的优越性。 本文提出一种结合SDS自评量表与视频记录的框架，用于自动解读抑郁症状。 Wanqing Xie,Lizhong Liang,Yao Lu,Chen Wang,Jihong Shen,Hui Luo,Xiaofeng Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Jianbo Liu,Ying Wang,Shiming Xiang,Chunhong Pan
title: HAN: An Efficient Hierarchical Self-Attention Network for Skeleton-Based Gesture Recognition
title_zh: HAN：一种用于基于骨架的手势识别的高效分层自注意力网络
comment: Under peer review for TCSVT
comments: Under peer review for TCSVT
abstract: Previous methods for skeleton-based gesture recognition mostly arrange the skeleton sequence into a pseudo picture or spatial-temporal graph and apply deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) or Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) for feature extraction. Although achieving superior results, these methods have inherent limitations in dynamically capturing local features of interactive hand parts, and the computing efficiency still remains a serious issue. In this work, the self-attention mechanism is introduced to alleviate this problem. Considering the hierarchical structure of hand joints, we propose an efficient hierarchical self-attention network (HAN) for skeleton-based gesture recognition, which is based on pure self-attention without any CNN, RNN or GCN operators. Specifically, the joint self-attention module is used to capture spatial features of fingers, the finger self-attention module is designed to aggregate features of the whole hand. In terms of temporal features, the temporal self-attention module is utilized to capture the temporal dynamics of the fingers and the entire hand. Finally, these features are fused by the fusion self-attention module for gesture classification. Experiments show that our method achieves competitive results on three gesture recognition datasets with much lower computational complexity.
summary: Previous methods for skeleton-based gesture recognition mostly arrange the skeleton sequence into a pseudo picture or spatial-temporal graph and apply deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) or Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) for feature extraction. Although achieving superior results, these methods have inherent limitations in dynamically capturing local features of interactive hand parts, and the computing efficiency still remains a serious issue. In this work, the self-attention mechanism is introduced to alleviate this problem. Considering the hierarchical structure of hand joints, we propose an efficient hierarchical self-attention network (HAN) for skeleton-based gesture recognition, which is based on pure self-attention without any CNN, RNN or GCN operators. Specifically, the joint self-attention module is used to capture spatial features of fingers, the finger self-attention module is designed to aggregate features of the whole hand. In terms of temporal features, the temporal self-attention module is utilized to capture the temporal dynamics of the fingers and the entire hand. Finally, these features are fused by the fusion self-attention module for gesture classification. Experiments show that our method achieves competitive results on three gesture recognition datasets with much lower computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 以往基于骨骼的手势识别方法大多将骨骼序列排列成伪图片或时空图，并应用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）或图卷积网络（GCN）进行特征提取。尽管取得了优异的结果，但这些方法在动态捕获交互式手部局部特征方面存在固有的局限性，并且计算效率仍然是一个严重的问题。在这项工作中，引入了自注意力机制来缓解这个问题。考虑到手关节的层次结构，我们提出了一种用于基于骨架的手势识别的高效层次自注意力网络（HAN），该网络基于纯自注意力，无需任何 CNN、RNN 或 GCN 算子。具体来说，关节自注意力模块用于捕获手指的空间特征，手指自注意力模块旨在聚合整只手的特征。在时间特征方面，利用时间自注意力模块来捕获手指和整只手的时间动态。最后，通过融合自注意力模块融合这些特征进行手势分类。实验表明，我们的方法在三个手势识别数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果，并且计算复杂度低得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的基于骨骼的手势识别方法HAN，利用自注意力机制替代传统CNN、RNN或GCN操作。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在动态捕捉手部交互局部特征和计算效率方面存在局限，因此需要一种更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于纯自注意力机制的分层自注意力网络（HAN），包括关节自注意力模块、手指自注意力模块、时间自注意力模块和融合自注意力模块。
AI.result: 在三个手势识别数据集上，该方法取得了具有竞争力的结果，且计算复杂度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: HAN通过自注意力机制有效捕捉空间和时间特征，实现了高效的骨骼手势识别。

authors_text: Jing Zhang,Jianwen Xie,Zilong Zheng,Nick Barnes
title: Energy-Based Generative Cooperative Saliency Prediction
title_zh: 基于能量的生成合作显着性预测
comment: ef:The Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI) 2022
comments: ef:The Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI) 2022
abstract: Conventional saliency prediction models typically learn a deterministic mapping from an image to its saliency map, and thus fail to explain the subjective nature of human attention. In this paper, to model the uncertainty of visual saliency, we study the saliency prediction problem from the perspective of generative models by learning a conditional probability distribution over the saliency map given an input image, and treating the saliency prediction as a sampling process from the learned distribution. Specifically, we propose a generative cooperative saliency prediction framework, where a conditional latent variable model (LVM) and a conditional energy-based model (EBM) are jointly trained to predict salient objects in a cooperative manner. The LVM serves as a fast but coarse predictor to efficiently produce an initial saliency map, which is then refined by the iterative Langevin revision of the EBM that serves as a slow but fine predictor. Such a coarse-to-fine cooperative saliency prediction strategy offers the best of both worlds. Moreover, we propose a "cooperative learning while recovering" strategy and apply it to weakly supervised saliency prediction, where saliency annotations of training images are partially observed. Lastly, we find that the learned energy function in the EBM can serve as a refinement module that can refine the results of other pre-trained saliency prediction models. Experimental results show that our model can produce a set of diverse and plausible saliency maps of an image, and obtain state-of-the-art performance in both fully supervised and weakly supervised saliency prediction tasks.
summary: Conventional saliency prediction models typically learn a deterministic mapping from an image to its saliency map, and thus fail to explain the subjective nature of human attention. In this paper, to model the uncertainty of visual saliency, we study the saliency prediction problem from the perspective of generative models by learning a conditional probability distribution over the saliency map given an input image, and treating the saliency prediction as a sampling process from the learned distribution. Specifically, we propose a generative cooperative saliency prediction framework, where a conditional latent variable model (LVM) and a conditional energy-based model (EBM) are jointly trained to predict salient objects in a cooperative manner. The LVM serves as a fast but coarse predictor to efficiently produce an initial saliency map, which is then refined by the iterative Langevin revision of the EBM that serves as a slow but fine predictor. Such a coarse-to-fine cooperative saliency prediction strategy offers the best of both worlds. Moreover, we propose a "cooperative learning while recovering" strategy and apply it to weakly supervised saliency prediction, where saliency annotations of training images are partially observed. Lastly, we find that the learned energy function in the EBM can serve as a refinement module that can refine the results of other pre-trained saliency prediction models. Experimental results show that our model can produce a set of diverse and plausible saliency maps of an image, and obtain state-of-the-art performance in both fully supervised and weakly supervised saliency prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 传统的显着性预测模型通常学习从图像到其显着性图的确定性映射，因此无法解释人类注意力的主观本质。在本文中，为了模拟视觉显着性的不确定性，我们从生成模型的角度研究显着性预测问题，通过学习给定输入图像的显着性图上的条件概率分布，并将显着性预测视为从学习的分布中采样的过程。具体来说，我们提出了一种生成式协作显着性预测框架，其中联合训练条件潜变量模型（LVM）和基于条件能量的模型（EBM）以协作方式预测显着对象。 LVM 充当快速但粗略的预测器，以有效地生成初始显着性图，然后通过充当缓慢但精细的预测器的 EBM 的迭代 Langevin 修订版对其进行细化。这种从粗到细的协作显着性预测策略提供了两全其美的优点。此外，我们提出了一种“恢复时合作学习”策略，并将其应用于弱监督显着性预测，其中部分观察到训练图像的显着性注释。最后，我们发现 EBM 中学习到的能量函数可以作为细化模块，可以细化其他预训练的显着性预测模型的结果。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以生成一组多样化且合理的图像显着性图，并在完全监督和弱监督的显着性预测任务中获得最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成模型的协作显著性预测框架，以处理视觉显著性的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统显著性预测模型采用确定性映射无法解释人类注意力的主观性，需通过生成模型建模显著性不确定性并学习条件概率分布。
AI.method: 联合训练条件潜在变量模型（LVM）与条件能量模型（EBM），LVM生成粗略显著图后通过EBM迭代Langevin修正细化，结合弱监督下的协作学习策略，并利用EBM能量函数优化其他预训练模型。
AI.result: 生成多样化合理显著图，在全监督与弱监督任务中均达到最先进性能，EBM能量函数可有效优化其他模型结果。
AI.conclusion: 协作框架融合LVM与EBM优势，提升预测质量，验证了能量模型在显著性优化中的潜力。

authors_text: Bo Yang,Koichiro Inoue,Satoshi Kitazaki,Kimihiko Nakano
title: Influences on Drivers' Understandings of Systems by Presenting Image Recognition Results
title_zh: 图像识别结果呈现对驾驶员对系统理解的影响
abstract: It is essential to help drivers have appropriate understandings of level 2 automated driving systems for keeping driving safety. A human machine interface (HMI) was proposed to present real time results of image recognition by the automated driving systems to drivers. It was expected that drivers could better understand the capabilities of the systems by observing the proposed HMI. Driving simulator experiments with 18 participants were preformed to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed system. Experimental results indicated that the proposed HMI could effectively inform drivers of potential risks continuously and help drivers better understand the level 2 automated driving systems.
summary: It is essential to help drivers have appropriate understandings of level 2 automated driving systems for keeping driving safety. A human machine interface (HMI) was proposed to present real time results of image recognition by the automated driving systems to drivers. It was expected that drivers could better understand the capabilities of the systems by observing the proposed HMI. Driving simulator experiments with 18 participants were preformed to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed system. Experimental results indicated that the proposed HMI could effectively inform drivers of potential risks continuously and help drivers better understand the level 2 automated driving systems.
abstract_zh: 帮助驾驶员正确理解二级自动驾驶系统对于保证驾驶安全至关重要。提出了一种人机界面（HMI）来向驾驶员呈现自动驾驶系统的图像识别的实时结果。预计驾驶员可以通过观察建议的 HMI 更好地了解系统的功能。对 18 名参与者进行了驾驶模拟器实验，以评估所提出系统的有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的HMI可以有效地持续告知驾驶员潜在的风险，并帮助驾驶员更好地了解2级自动驾驶系统。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估一种人机界面（HMI），通过实时展示图像识别结果来提升驾驶员对L2级自动驾驶系统的理解。
AI.motivation: 帮助驾驶员正确理解L2级自动驾驶系统的能力，以提高驾驶安全性，减少因误解系统能力导致的事故。
AI.method: 通过驾驶模拟实验，邀请18名参与者测试所提出的HMI在实时展示图像识别结果方面的有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该HMI能有效向驾驶员传达持续的潜在风险，并增强其对L2级自动驾驶系统的理解。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的HMI能有效提升驾驶员对L2级自动驾驶系统的理解，从而提高驾驶安全性。

authors_text: Qiang Ji,Kang Wang
title: Bayesian Eye Tracking
title_zh: 贝叶斯眼动追踪
abstract: Model-based eye tracking has been a dominant approach for eye gaze tracking because of its ability to generalize to different subjects, without the need of any training data and eye gaze annotations. Model-based eye tracking, however, is susceptible to eye feature detection errors, in particular for eye tracking in the wild. To address this issue, we propose a Bayesian framework for model-based eye tracking. The proposed system consists of a cascade-Bayesian Convolutional Neural Network (c-BCNN) to capture the probabilistic relationships between eye appearance and its landmarks, and a geometric eye model to estimate eye gaze from the eye landmarks. Given a testing eye image, the Bayesian framework can generate, through Bayesian inference, the eye gaze distribution without explicit landmark detection and model training, based on which it not only estimates the most likely eye gaze but also its uncertainty. Furthermore, with Bayesian inference instead of point-based inference, our model can not only generalize better to different sub-jects, head poses, and environments but also is robust to image noise and landmark detection errors. Finally, with the estimated gaze uncertainty, we can construct a cascade architecture that allows us to progressively improve gaze estimation accuracy. Compared to state-of-the-art model-based and learning-based methods, the proposed Bayesian framework demonstrates significant improvement in generalization capability across several benchmark datasets and in accuracy and robustness under challenging real-world conditions.
summary: Model-based eye tracking has been a dominant approach for eye gaze tracking because of its ability to generalize to different subjects, without the need of any training data and eye gaze annotations. Model-based eye tracking, however, is susceptible to eye feature detection errors, in particular for eye tracking in the wild. To address this issue, we propose a Bayesian framework for model-based eye tracking. The proposed system consists of a cascade-Bayesian Convolutional Neural Network (c-BCNN) to capture the probabilistic relationships between eye appearance and its landmarks, and a geometric eye model to estimate eye gaze from the eye landmarks. Given a testing eye image, the Bayesian framework can generate, through Bayesian inference, the eye gaze distribution without explicit landmark detection and model training, based on which it not only estimates the most likely eye gaze but also its uncertainty. Furthermore, with Bayesian inference instead of point-based inference, our model can not only generalize better to different sub-jects, head poses, and environments but also is robust to image noise and landmark detection errors. Finally, with the estimated gaze uncertainty, we can construct a cascade architecture that allows us to progressively improve gaze estimation accuracy. Compared to state-of-the-art model-based and learning-based methods, the proposed Bayesian framework demonstrates significant improvement in generalization capability across several benchmark datasets and in accuracy and robustness under challenging real-world conditions.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的眼睛跟踪一直是眼睛注视跟踪的主要方法，因为它能够推广到不同的受试者，而不需要任何训练数据和眼睛注视注释。然而，基于模型的眼睛跟踪很容易受到眼睛特征检测错误的影响，特别是对于野外的眼睛跟踪。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个基于模型的眼球追踪的贝叶斯框架。该系统由级联贝叶斯卷积神经网络（c-BCNN）和几何眼睛模型组成，用于捕获眼睛外观与其标志之间的概率关系，以及用于根据眼睛标志估计眼睛注视的几何眼睛模型。给定测试眼睛图像，贝叶斯框架可以通过贝叶斯推理生成眼睛注视分布，而无需明确的标志检测和模型训练，基于此，它不仅估计最可能的眼睛注视，而且还估计其不确定性。此外，通过贝叶斯推理而不是基于点的推理，我们的模型不仅可以更好地泛化到不同的主题、头部姿势和环境，而且对图像噪声和地标检测误差也具有鲁棒性。最后，利用估计的注视不确定性，我们可以构建一个级联架构，使我们能够逐步提高注视估计的准确性。与最先进的基于模型和基于学习的方法相比，所提出的贝叶斯框架证明了跨多个基准数据集的泛化能力以及在具有挑战性的现实条件下的准确性和鲁棒性的显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯框架的模型化眼动追踪方法，以提高在真实环境下的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统模型化眼动追踪方法在真实场景中易受眼部特征检测误差影响，且难以处理噪声和不同个体差异，需改进以提升泛化能力与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出级联贝叶斯卷积神经网络（c-BCNN）捕捉眼部外观与关键点的概率关系，并结合几何眼模型估计眼动方向。通过贝叶斯推断直接生成眼动分布，无需显式关键点检测或模型训练，同时构建级联架构逐步提升估计精度。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和真实场景下，该方法较现有模型化和学习方法在泛化能力、准确性和抗干扰性方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯框架通过概率建模有效处理不确定性，为模型化眼动追踪提供了更鲁棒且适应性强的解决方案。

authors_text: Yuning Chai,Pei Sun,Jiquan Ngiam,Weiyue Wang,Benjamin Caine,Vijay Vasudevan,Xiao Zhang,Dragomir Anguelov
title: To the Point: Efficient 3D Object Detection in the Range Image with Graph Convolution Kernels
title_zh: 重点：使用图卷积核在距离图像中进行高效 3D 对象检测
comment: ef:CVPR 2021
comments: ef:CVPR 2021
abstract: 3D object detection is vital for many robotics applications. For tasks where a 2D perspective range image exists, we propose to learn a 3D representation directly from this range image view. To this end, we designed a 2D convolutional network architecture that carries the 3D spherical coordinates of each pixel throughout the network. Its layers can consume any arbitrary convolution kernel in place of the default inner product kernel and exploit the underlying local geometry around each pixel. We outline four such kernels: a dense kernel according to the bag-of-words paradigm, and three graph kernels inspired by recent graph neural network advances: the Transformer, the PointNet, and the Edge Convolution. We also explore cross-modality fusion with the camera image, facilitated by operating in the perspective range image view. Our method performs competitively on the Waymo Open Dataset and improves the state-of-the-art AP for pedestrian detection from 69.7% to 75.5%. It is also efficient in that our smallest model, which still outperforms the popular PointPillars in quality, requires 180 times fewer FLOPS and model parameters
summary: 3D object detection is vital for many robotics applications. For tasks where a 2D perspective range image exists, we propose to learn a 3D representation directly from this range image view. To this end, we designed a 2D convolutional network architecture that carries the 3D spherical coordinates of each pixel throughout the network. Its layers can consume any arbitrary convolution kernel in place of the default inner product kernel and exploit the underlying local geometry around each pixel. We outline four such kernels: a dense kernel according to the bag-of-words paradigm, and three graph kernels inspired by recent graph neural network advances: the Transformer, the PointNet, and the Edge Convolution. We also explore cross-modality fusion with the camera image, facilitated by operating in the perspective range image view. Our method performs competitively on the Waymo Open Dataset and improves the state-of-the-art AP for pedestrian detection from 69.7% to 75.5%. It is also efficient in that our smallest model, which still outperforms the popular PointPillars in quality, requires 180 times fewer FLOPS and model parameters
abstract_zh: 3D 物体检测对于许多机器人应用至关重要。对于存在 2D 透视范围图像的任务，我们建议直接从该范围图像视图学习 3D 表示。为此，我们设计了一个 2D 卷积网络架构，它携带整个网络中每个像素的 3D 球面坐标。它的层可以使用任何任意卷积核来代替默认的内积核，并利用每个像素周围的底层局部几何结构。我们概述了四个这样的内核：根据词袋范式的密集内核，以及受最新图神经网络进展启发的三个图内核：Transformer、PointNet 和 Edge Convolution。我们还探索了与相机图像的跨模态融合，通过在透视范围图像视图中进行操作来促进。我们的方法在 Waymo 开放数据集上具有竞争力，并将行人检测的最先进的 AP 从 69.7% 提高到 75.5%。它还非常高效，因为我们最小的模型在质量上仍然优于流行的 PointPillars，所需的 FLOPS 和模型参数减少了 180 倍

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的3D物体检测方法，直接从范围图像中学习3D表示。
AI.motivation: 3D物体检测在许多机器人应用中至关重要，而现有的方法在处理范围图像时效率较低，且难以直接利用范围图像的3D几何信息。
AI.method: 设计了一种2D卷积网络架构，该架构在整个网络中保留每个像素的3D球面坐标。通过使用不同的卷积核（如密集核、Transformer、PointNet和Edge Convolution）来利用像素周围的局部几何信息，并探索了与相机图像的跨模态融合。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset上，该方法在行人检测的平均精度（AP）上从69.7%提升至75.5%。其最小模型在保持质量的同时，所需的计算量和参数量仅为PointPillars的1/180。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高检测性能的同时显著提高了计算效率，为3D物体检测提供了新的思路。

search_text: To the Point: Efficient 3D Object Detection in the Range Image with Graph Convolution Kernels 重点：使用图卷积核在距离图像中进行高效 3D 对象检测 3D object detection is vital for many robotics applications. For tasks where a 2D perspective range image exists, we propose to learn a 3D representation directly from this range image view. To this end, we designed a 2D convolutional network architecture that carries the 3D spherical coordinates of each pixel throughout the network. Its layers can consume any arbitrary convolution kernel in place of the default inner product kernel and exploit the underlying local geometry around each pixel. We outline four such kernels: a dense kernel according to the bag-of-words paradigm, and three graph kernels inspired by recent graph neural network advances: the Transformer, the PointNet, and the Edge Convolution. We also explore cross-modality fusion with the camera image, facilitated by operating in the perspective range image view. Our method performs competitively on the Waymo Open Dataset and improves the state-of-the-art AP for pedestrian detection from 69.7% to 75.5%. It is also efficient in that our smallest model, which still outperforms the popular PointPillars in quality, requires 180 times fewer FLOPS and model parameters 3D 物体检测对于许多机器人应用至关重要。对于存在 2D 透视范围图像的任务，我们建议直接从该范围图像视图学习 3D 表示。为此，我们设计了一个 2D 卷积网络架构，它携带整个网络中每个像素的 3D 球面坐标。它的层可以使用任何任意卷积核来代替默认的内积核，并利用每个像素周围的底层局部几何结构。我们概述了四个这样的内核：根据词袋范式的密集内核，以及受最新图神经网络进展启发的三个图内核：Transformer、PointNet 和 Edge Convolution。我们还探索了与相机图像的跨模态融合，通过在透视范围图像视图中进行操作来促进。我们的方法在 Waymo 开放数据集上具有竞争力，并将行人检测的最先进的 AP 从 69.7% 提高到 75.5%。它还非常高效，因为我们最小的模型在质量上仍然优于流行的 PointPillars，所需的 FLOPS 和模型参数减少了 180 倍 本文提出了一种高效的3D物体检测方法，直接从范围图像中学习3D表示。 Yuning Chai,Pei Sun,Jiquan Ngiam,Weiyue Wang,Benjamin Caine,Vijay Vasudevan,Xiao Zhang,Dragomir Anguelov cs.CV

authors_text: Qianru Zhou,Alasdair J. G. Gray,Stephen McLaughlin
title: SeaNet -- Towards A Knowledge Graph Based Autonomic Management of Software Defined Networks
title_zh: SeaNet——迈向基于知识图谱的软件定义网络自主管理
abstract: Automatic network management driven by Artificial Intelligent technologies has been heatedly discussed over decades. However, current reports mainly focus on theoretic proposals and architecture designs, works on practical implementations on real-life networks are yet to appear. This paper proposes our effort toward the implementation of knowledge graph driven approach for autonomic network management in software defined networks (SDNs), termed as SeaNet. Driven by the ToCo ontology, SeaNet is reprogrammed based on Mininet (a SDN emulator). It consists three core components, a knowledge graph generator, a SPARQL engine, and a network management API. The knowledge graph generator represents the knowledge in the telecommunication network management tasks into formally represented ontology driven model. Expert experience and network management rules can be formalized into knowledge graph and by automatically inferenced by SPARQL engine, Network management API is able to packet technology-specific details and expose technology-independent interfaces to users. The Experiments are carried out to evaluate proposed work by comparing with a commercial SDN controller Ryu implemented by the same language Python. The evaluation results show that SeaNet is considerably faster in most circumstances than Ryu and the SeaNet code is significantly more compact. Benefit from RDF reasoning, SeaNet is able to achieve O(1) time complexity on different scales of the knowledge graph while the traditional database can achieve O(nlogn) at its best. With the developed network management API, SeaNet enables researchers to develop semantic-intelligent applications on their own SDNs.
summary: Automatic network management driven by Artificial Intelligent technologies has been heatedly discussed over decades. However, current reports mainly focus on theoretic proposals and architecture designs, works on practical implementations on real-life networks are yet to appear. This paper proposes our effort toward the implementation of knowledge graph driven approach for autonomic network management in software defined networks (SDNs), termed as SeaNet. Driven by the ToCo ontology, SeaNet is reprogrammed based on Mininet (a SDN emulator). It consists three core components, a knowledge graph generator, a SPARQL engine, and a network management API. The knowledge graph generator represents the knowledge in the telecommunication network management tasks into formally represented ontology driven model. Expert experience and network management rules can be formalized into knowledge graph and by automatically inferenced by SPARQL engine, Network management API is able to packet technology-specific details and expose technology-independent interfaces to users. The Experiments are carried out to evaluate proposed work by comparing with a commercial SDN controller Ryu implemented by the same language Python. The evaluation results show that SeaNet is considerably faster in most circumstances than Ryu and the SeaNet code is significantly more compact. Benefit from RDF reasoning, SeaNet is able to achieve O(1) time complexity on different scales of the knowledge graph while the traditional database can achieve O(nlogn) at its best. With the developed network management API, SeaNet enables researchers to develop semantic-intelligent applications on their own SDNs.
abstract_zh: 人工智能技术驱动的自动网络管理几十年来一直受到热烈讨论。然而，目前的报告主要集中在理论建议和架构设计上，在现实网络上的实际实现工作尚未出现。本文提出了我们在软件定义网络（SDN）（称为 SeaNet）中实现自主网络管理的知识图驱动方法的努力。 SeaNet在ToCo本体驱动下，基于Mininet（SDN仿真器）重新编程。它由三个核心组件组成：知识图生成器、SPARQL 引擎和网络管理 API。知识图生成器将电信网络管理任务中的知识表示为形式化表示的本体驱动模型。专家经验和网络管理规则可以形式化为知识图谱，并通过SPARQL引擎自动推理，网络管理API能够打包特定于技术的细节并向用户公开与技术无关的接口。通过与由相同语言 Python 实现的商业 SDN 控制器 Ryu 进行比较，进行实验来评估所提出的工作。评估结果表明，SeaNet 在大多数情况下比 Ryu 快得多，并且 SeaNet 代码明显更紧凑。得益于RDF推理，SeaNet能够在不同规模的知识图谱上实现O(1)时间复杂度，而传统数据库最好能实现O(nlogn)。借助开发的网络管理 API，SeaNet 使研究人员能够在自己的 SDN 上开发语义智能应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeaNet，一种基于知识图谱的软件定义网络（SDN）自主管理方法，通过构建知识图谱和语义推理实现网络管理。
AI.motivation: 现有SDN自动管理研究多聚焦理论架构，缺乏实际可运行的实现方案，需探索知识图谱驱动的实践方法。
AI.method: 基于ToCo本体构建知识图谱，结合Mininet开发包含知识生成器、SPARQL引擎和管理API的SeaNet系统，利用RDF推理优化查询效率。
AI.result: 实验表明SeaNet相比Ryu控制器在多数场景下速度更快，代码更简洁，且知识图谱查询时间复杂度达O(1)。
AI.conclusion: SeaNet验证了知识图谱驱动的SDN自主管理可行性，为语义智能网络应用提供了有效实现路径。

authors_text: Pei Sun,Weiyue Wang,Yuning Chai,Gamaleldin Elsayed,Alex Bewley,Xiao Zhang,Cristian Sminchisescu,Dragomir Anguelov
title: RSN: Range Sparse Net for Efficient, Accurate LiDAR 3D Object Detection
title_zh: RSN：用于高效、准确 LiDAR 3D 物体检测的距离稀疏网络
comment: ef:CVPR 2021
comments: ef:CVPR 2021
abstract: The detection of 3D objects from LiDAR data is a critical component in most autonomous driving systems. Safe, high speed driving needs larger detection ranges, which are enabled by new LiDARs. These larger detection ranges require more efficient and accurate detection models. Towards this goal, we propose Range Sparse Net (RSN), a simple, efficient, and accurate 3D object detector in order to tackle real time 3D object detection in this extended detection regime. RSN predicts foreground points from range images and applies sparse convolutions on the selected foreground points to detect objects. The lightweight 2D convolutions on dense range images results in significantly fewer selected foreground points, thus enabling the later sparse convolutions in RSN to efficiently operate. Combining features from the range image further enhance detection accuracy. RSN runs at more than 60 frames per second on a 150m x 150m detection region on Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) while being more accurate than previously published detectors. As of 11/2020, RSN is ranked first in the WOD leaderboard based on the APH/LEVEL 1 metrics for LiDAR-based pedestrian and vehicle detection, while being several times faster than alternatives.
summary: The detection of 3D objects from LiDAR data is a critical component in most autonomous driving systems. Safe, high speed driving needs larger detection ranges, which are enabled by new LiDARs. These larger detection ranges require more efficient and accurate detection models. Towards this goal, we propose Range Sparse Net (RSN), a simple, efficient, and accurate 3D object detector in order to tackle real time 3D object detection in this extended detection regime. RSN predicts foreground points from range images and applies sparse convolutions on the selected foreground points to detect objects. The lightweight 2D convolutions on dense range images results in significantly fewer selected foreground points, thus enabling the later sparse convolutions in RSN to efficiently operate. Combining features from the range image further enhance detection accuracy. RSN runs at more than 60 frames per second on a 150m x 150m detection region on Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) while being more accurate than previously published detectors. As of 11/2020, RSN is ranked first in the WOD leaderboard based on the APH/LEVEL 1 metrics for LiDAR-based pedestrian and vehicle detection, while being several times faster than alternatives.
abstract_zh: 从 LiDAR 数据中检测 3D 物体是大多数自动驾驶系统的关键组成部分。安全、高速驾驶需要更大的检测范围，而新型激光雷达可以实现这一点。这些更大的检测范围需要更高效、更准确的检测模型。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 Range Sparse Net (RSN)，这是一种简单、高效且准确的 3D 对象检测器，以便在这种扩展检测机制中处理实时 3D 对象检测。 RSN 从距离图像中预测前景点，并对选定的前景点应用稀疏卷积来检测对象。密集范围图像上的轻量级 2D 卷积会导致选定的前景点显着减少，从而使 RSN 中后续的稀疏卷积能够有效运行。结合距离图像的特征进一步提高检测精度。 RSN 在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 的 150m x 150m 检测区域上以每秒超过 60 帧的速度运行，同时比之前发布的检测器更准确。截至 2020 年 11 月，根据基于 LiDAR 的行人和车辆检测的 APH/LEVEL 1 指标，RSN 在 WOD 排行榜中排名第一，同时比替代方案快几倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效准确的LiDAR三维目标检测方法RSN，用于处理扩展检测范围的实时需求。
AI.motivation: 新型LiDAR扩大了检测范围，但现有模型在效率和精度上难以满足大范围实时检测需求。
AI.method: 通过预测距离图像前景点并应用稀疏卷积，在减少计算量的同时结合2D卷积特征提升检测精度。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集150m²区域实现60+FPS，行人/车辆检测准确率超现有方法且速度提升数倍。
AI.conclusion: RSN在保持高精度的同时显著提升检测效率，是大范围LiDAR三维检测的有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种高效准确的LiDAR三维目标检测方法RSN，用于处理扩展检测范围的实时需求。
motivation: 新型LiDAR扩大了检测范围，但现有模型在效率和精度上难以满足大范围实时检测需求。
method: 通过预测距离图像前景点并应用稀疏卷积，在减少计算量的同时结合2D卷积特征提升检测精度。
result: 在Waymo数据集150m²区域实现60+FPS，行人/车辆检测准确率超现有方法且速度提升数倍。
conclusion: RSN在保持高精度的同时显著提升检测效率，是大范围LiDAR三维检测的有效解决方案。
search_text: RSN: Range Sparse Net for Efficient, Accurate LiDAR 3D Object Detection RSN：用于高效、准确 LiDAR 3D 物体检测的距离稀疏网络 The detection of 3D objects from LiDAR data is a critical component in most autonomous driving systems. Safe, high speed driving needs larger detection ranges, which are enabled by new LiDARs. These larger detection ranges require more efficient and accurate detection models. Towards this goal, we propose Range Sparse Net (RSN), a simple, efficient, and accurate 3D object detector in order to tackle real time 3D object detection in this extended detection regime. RSN predicts foreground points from range images and applies sparse convolutions on the selected foreground points to detect objects. The lightweight 2D convolutions on dense range images results in significantly fewer selected foreground points, thus enabling the later sparse convolutions in RSN to efficiently operate. Combining features from the range image further enhance detection accuracy. RSN runs at more than 60 frames per second on a 150m x 150m detection region on Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) while being more accurate than previously published detectors. As of 11/2020, RSN is ranked first in the WOD leaderboard based on the APH/LEVEL 1 metrics for LiDAR-based pedestrian and vehicle detection, while being several times faster than alternatives. 从 LiDAR 数据中检测 3D 物体是大多数自动驾驶系统的关键组成部分。安全、高速驾驶需要更大的检测范围，而新型激光雷达可以实现这一点。这些更大的检测范围需要更高效、更准确的检测模型。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 Range Sparse Net (RSN)，这是一种简单、高效且准确的 3D 对象检测器，以便在这种扩展检测机制中处理实时 3D 对象检测。 RSN 从距离图像中预测前景点，并对选定的前景点应用稀疏卷积来检测对象。密集范围图像上的轻量级 2D 卷积会导致选定的前景点显着减少，从而使 RSN 中后续的稀疏卷积能够有效运行。结合距离图像的特征进一步提高检测精度。 RSN 在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 的 150m x 150m 检测区域上以每秒超过 60 帧的速度运行，同时比之前发布的检测器更准确。截至 2020 年 11 月，根据基于 LiDAR 的行人和车辆检测的 APH/LEVEL 1 指标，RSN 在 WOD 排行榜中排名第一，同时比替代方案快几倍。 本文提出一种高效准确的LiDAR三维目标检测方法RSN，用于处理扩展检测范围的实时需求。 Pei Sun,Weiyue Wang,Yuning Chai,Gamaleldin Elsayed,Alex Bewley,Xiao Zhang,Cristian Sminchisescu,Dragomir Anguelov cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel McDuff,Yale Song,Jiyoung Lee,Vibhav Vineet,Sai Vemprala,Nicholas Gyde,Hadi Salman,Shuang Ma,Kwanghoon Sohn,Ashish Kapoor
title: CausalCity: Complex Simulations with Agency for Causal Discovery and Reasoning
title_zh: CausalCity：利用机构进行因果发现和推理的复杂模拟
abstract: The ability to perform causal and counterfactual reasoning are central properties of human intelligence. Decision-making systems that can perform these types of reasoning have the potential to be more generalizable and interpretable. Simulations have helped advance the state-of-the-art in this domain, by providing the ability to systematically vary parameters (e.g., confounders) and generate examples of the outcomes in the case of counterfactual scenarios. However, simulating complex temporal causal events in multi-agent scenarios, such as those that exist in driving and vehicle navigation, is challenging. To help address this, we present a high-fidelity simulation environment that is designed for developing algorithms for causal discovery and counterfactual reasoning in the safety-critical context. A core component of our work is to introduce \textit{agency}, such that it is simple to define and create complex scenarios using high-level definitions. The vehicles then operate with agency to complete these objectives, meaning low-level behaviors need only be controlled if necessary. We perform experiments with three state-of-the-art methods to create baselines and highlight the affordances of this environment. Finally, we highlight challenges and opportunities for future work.
summary: The ability to perform causal and counterfactual reasoning are central properties of human intelligence. Decision-making systems that can perform these types of reasoning have the potential to be more generalizable and interpretable. Simulations have helped advance the state-of-the-art in this domain, by providing the ability to systematically vary parameters (e.g., confounders) and generate examples of the outcomes in the case of counterfactual scenarios. However, simulating complex temporal causal events in multi-agent scenarios, such as those that exist in driving and vehicle navigation, is challenging. To help address this, we present a high-fidelity simulation environment that is designed for developing algorithms for causal discovery and counterfactual reasoning in the safety-critical context. A core component of our work is to introduce \textit{agency}, such that it is simple to define and create complex scenarios using high-level definitions. The vehicles then operate with agency to complete these objectives, meaning low-level behaviors need only be controlled if necessary. We perform experiments with three state-of-the-art methods to create baselines and highlight the affordances of this environment. Finally, we highlight challenges and opportunities for future work.
abstract_zh: 进行因果推理和反事实推理的能力是人类智力的核心属性。能够执行这些类型推理的决策系统有可能更具概括性和可解释性。模拟通过提供系统地改变参数（例如混杂因素）并在反事实场景中生成结果示例的能力，帮助推进了该领域的最先进技术。然而，模拟多智能体场景中复杂的时间因果事件（例如驾驶和车辆导航中存在的事件）具有挑战性。为了帮助解决这个问题，我们提出了一个高保真模拟环境，旨在开发在安全关键环境中进行因果发现和反事实推理的算法。我们工作的核心组成部分是引入 \textit{agency}，以便使用高级定义来定义和创建复杂的场景变得简单。然后，车辆通过代理操作来完成这些目标，这意味着只有在必要时才需要控制低级行为。我们使用三种最先进的方法进行实验来创建基线并突出该环境的可供性。最后，我们强调了未来工作的挑战和机遇。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CausalCity模拟环境，旨在通过引入代理机制解决复杂多智能体场景中的因果发现与反事实推理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟难以处理自动驾驶等安全关键场景的复杂因果关系，亟需高保真环境支持可解释的因果推理算法研究。
AI.method: 构建包含代理机制的高保真模拟环境，通过高层定义生成复杂场景，车辆自主完成目标并仅在必要时控制低层行为，结合三种先进方法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 验证了环境的有效性，展示了其在因果发现和反事实推理中的优势，同时明确了未来研究的挑战方向。
AI.conclusion: CausalCity为安全关键领域的因果推理提供了新平台，但需进一步解决复杂场景建模与算法泛化性等挑战。

authors_text: Ting-Kuei Hu,Fernando Gama,Tianlong Chen,Wenqing Zheng,Zhangyang Wang,Alejandro Ribeiro,Brian M. Sadler
title: Scalable Perception-Action-Communication Loops with Convolutional and Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积和图神经网络的可扩展感知-动作-通信循环
abstract: In this paper, we present a perception-action-communication loop design using Vision-based Graph Aggregation and Inference (VGAI). This multi-agent decentralized learning-to-control framework maps raw visual observations to agent actions, aided by local communication among neighboring agents. Our framework is implemented by a cascade of a convolutional and a graph neural network (CNN / GNN), addressing agent-level visual perception and feature learning, as well as swarm-level communication, local information aggregation and agent action inference, respectively. By jointly training the CNN and GNN, image features and communication messages are learned in conjunction to better address the specific task. We use imitation learning to train the VGAI controller in an offline phase, relying on a centralized expert controller. This results in a learned VGAI controller that can be deployed in a distributed manner for online execution. Additionally, the controller exhibits good scaling properties, with training in smaller teams and application in larger teams. Through a multi-agent flocking application, we demonstrate that VGAI yields performance comparable to or better than other decentralized controllers, using only the visual input modality and without accessing precise location or motion state information.
summary: In this paper, we present a perception-action-communication loop design using Vision-based Graph Aggregation and Inference (VGAI). This multi-agent decentralized learning-to-control framework maps raw visual observations to agent actions, aided by local communication among neighboring agents. Our framework is implemented by a cascade of a convolutional and a graph neural network (CNN / GNN), addressing agent-level visual perception and feature learning, as well as swarm-level communication, local information aggregation and agent action inference, respectively. By jointly training the CNN and GNN, image features and communication messages are learned in conjunction to better address the specific task. We use imitation learning to train the VGAI controller in an offline phase, relying on a centralized expert controller. This results in a learned VGAI controller that can be deployed in a distributed manner for online execution. Additionally, the controller exhibits good scaling properties, with training in smaller teams and application in larger teams. Through a multi-agent flocking application, we demonstrate that VGAI yields performance comparable to or better than other decentralized controllers, using only the visual input modality and without accessing precise location or motion state information.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于视觉的图聚合和推理（VGAI）的感知-行动-通信循环设计。这种多智能体去中心化学习控制框架将原始视觉观察映射到智能体动作，并借助相邻智能体之间的本地通信。我们的框架由卷积和图神经网络（CNN / GNN）的级联实现，分别解决代理级视觉感知和特征学习，以及群体级通信、本地信息聚合和代理动作推理。通过联合训练 CNN 和 GNN，结合学习图像特征和通信消息，以更好地解决特定任务。我们依靠集中式专家控制器，使用模仿学习在离线阶段训练 VGAI 控制器。这会产生一个可学习的 VGAI 控制器，可以以分布式方式部署以进行在线执行。此外，该控制器表现出良好的扩展特性，适合在较小的团队中进行培训并在较大的团队中应用。通过多智能体集群应用程序，我们证明了 VGAI 的性能可与其他分散式控制器相媲美或更好，仅使用视觉输入模式，无需访问精确的位置或运动状态信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉的图聚合与推理（VGAI）框架，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）和图神经网络（GNN）的级联结构，实现多智能体系统的感知-动作-通信循环。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化控制框架在视觉输入和有限通信条件下难以有效协调多智能体行为，需设计无需精确位置信息的视觉感知与通信机制。
AI.method: 采用CNN处理单体视觉感知，GNN实现群体通信与动作推理，通过联合训练使图像特征与通信信息协同学习；利用模仿学习在离线阶段训练控制器，并支持分布式在线部署。
AI.result: 在多智能体集群控制任务中，仅依赖视觉输入且无需精确状态信息时，VGAI性能优于或媲美其他去中心化控制器，且具备从小规模训练到大规模应用的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: VGAI框架通过视觉感知与通信的联合学习，有效解决了多智能体去中心化控制问题，为复杂场景下的群体智能提供了可扩展的解决方案。

This results in a learned VGAI controller that can be deployed in a distributed manner for online execution. Additionally, the controller exhibits good scaling properties, with training in smaller teams and application in larger teams. Through a multi-agent flocking application, we demonstrate that VGAI yields performance comparable to or better than other decentralized controllers, using only the visual input modality and without accessing precise location or motion state information. 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于视觉的图聚合和推理（VGAI）的感知-行动-通信循环设计。这种多智能体去中心化学习控制框架将原始视觉观察映射到智能体动作，并借助相邻智能体之间的本地通信。我们的框架由卷积和图神经网络（CNN / GNN）的级联实现，分别解决代理级视觉感知和特征学习，以及群体级通信、本地信息聚合和代理动作推理。通过联合训练 CNN 和 GNN，结合学习图像特征和通信消息，以更好地解决特定任务。我们依靠集中式专家控制器，使用模仿学习在离线阶段训练 VGAI 控制器。这会产生一个可学习的 VGAI 控制器，可以以分布式方式部署以进行在线执行。此外，该控制器表现出良好的扩展特性，适合在较小的团队中进行培训并在较大的团队中应用。通过多智能体集群应用程序，我们证明了 VGAI 的性能可与其他分散式控制器相媲美或更好，仅使用视觉输入模式，无需访问精确的位置或运动状态信息。 本文提出一种基于视觉的图聚合与推理（VGAI）框架，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）和图神经网络（GNN）的级联结构，实现多智能体系统的感知-动作-通信循环。 Ting-Kuei Hu,Fernando Gama,Tianlong Chen,Wenqing Zheng,Zhangyang Wang,Alejandro Ribeiro,Brian M. Sadler cs.RO,cs.LG,cs.MA,eess.SP,eess.SY

authors_text: Stefan Bamberger,Felix Krahmer,Rachel Ward
title: Johnson-Lindenstrauss Embeddings with Kronecker Structure
title_zh: 具有 Kronecker 结构的 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 嵌入
abstract: We prove the Johnson-Lindenstrauss property for matrices $ΦD_ξ$ where $Φ$ has the restricted isometry property and $D_ξ$ is a diagonal matrix containing the entries of a Kronecker product $ξ= ξ^{(1)} \otimes \dots \otimes ξ^{(d)}$ of $d$ independent Rademacher vectors. Such embeddings have been proposed in recent works for a number of applications concerning compression of tensor structured data, including the oblivious sketching procedure by Ahle et al. for approximate tensor computations. For preserving the norms of $p$ points simultaneously, our result requires $Φ$ to have the restricted isometry property for sparsity $C(d) (\log p)^d$. In the case of subsampled Hadamard matrices, this can improve the dependence of the embedding dimension on $p$ to $(\log p)^d$ while the best previously known result required $(\log p)^{d + 1}$. That is, for the case of $d=2$ at the core of the oblivious sketching procedure by Ahle et al., the scaling improves from cubic to quadratic. We provide a counterexample to prove that the scaling established in our result is optimal under mild assumptions.
summary: We prove the Johnson-Lindenstrauss property for matrices $ΦD_ξ$ where $Φ$ has the restricted isometry property and $D_ξ$ is a diagonal matrix containing the entries of a Kronecker product $ξ= ξ^{(1)} \otimes \dots \otimes ξ^{(d)}$ of $d$ independent Rademacher vectors. Such embeddings have been proposed in recent works for a number of applications concerning compression of tensor structured data, including the oblivious sketching procedure by Ahle et al. for approximate tensor computations. For preserving the norms of $p$ points simultaneously, our result requires $Φ$ to have the restricted isometry property for sparsity $C(d) (\log p)^d$. In the case of subsampled Hadamard matrices, this can improve the dependence of the embedding dimension on $p$ to $(\log p)^d$ while the best previously known result required $(\log p)^{d + 1}$. That is, for the case of $d=2$ at the core of the oblivious sketching procedure by Ahle et al., the scaling improves from cubic to quadratic. We provide a counterexample to prove that the scaling established in our result is optimal under mild assumptions.
abstract_zh: 我们证明了矩阵 $ΦD_ψ$ 的 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 性质，其中 $Φ$ 具有受限制的等距性质，$D_ψ$ 是一个对角矩阵，其中包含 $d$ 个独立 Rademacher 向量的克罗内克乘积 $ψ= ψ^{(1)} \otimes \dots \otimes xi^{(d)}$ 的条目。这种嵌入在最近的工作中已经被提出，用于许多有关张量结构化数据压缩的应用，包括 Ahle 等人的不经意的草图过程。用于近似张量计算。为了同时保留 $p$ 点的范数，我们的结果要求 $Φ$ 具有稀疏性 $C(d) (\log p)^d$ 的受限等距属性。在子采样 Hadamard 矩阵的情况下，这可以将嵌入维度对 $p$ 的依赖性提高到 $(\log p)^d$，而先前已知的最佳结果需要 $(\log p)^{d + 1}$。也就是说，对于 Ahle 等人的遗忘草图程序核心的 $d=2$ 的情况，缩放比例从三次改进为二次。我们提供了一个反例来证明我们的结果中建立的缩放比例在温和的假设下是最优的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有Kronecker结构的Johnson-Lindenstrauss嵌入，证明了当Φ满足受限等距性质（RIP）且D_ξ包含Kronecker积形式Rademacher向量时，矩阵ΦD_ξ具有Johnson-Lindenstrauss性质。
AI.motivation: 针对张量结构化数据的压缩问题，如Ahle等人的 oblivious sketching 过程，现有的嵌入方法在维度缩放上不够优，特别是在d=2时（Ahle方法的核心）缩放因子从立方降到平方有改进空间，因此需要更优的理论保证。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，证明当Φ满足稀疏度为C(d)(log p)^d的RIP性质时，矩阵ΦD_ξ可以同时保持p个点的范数，具有Johnson-Lindenstrauss性质。对于子采样Hadamard矩阵，嵌入维度对p的依赖可以改进到(log p)^d。
AI.result: 在子采样Hadamard矩阵情况下，嵌入维度对p的依赖从之前已知的(log p)^{d+1}改进到(log p)^d；对于d=2的情况，缩放从立方改进为二次。此外，还给出了反例证明该缩放在温和假设下是最优的。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的具有Kronecker结构的Johnson-Lindenstrauss嵌入的缩放结果是最优的，为张量结构化数据的压缩提供了更高效的理论保证。

authors_text: Jessica Dai,Sohini Upadhyay,Stephen H. Bach,Himabindu Lakkaraju
title: What will it take to generate fairness-preserving explanations?
title_zh: 怎样才能产生维护公平的解释？
comment: Presented at ICML 2021 Workshop on Theoretic Foundation, Criticism, and Application Trend of Explainable AI
comments: Presented at ICML 2021 Workshop on Theoretic Foundation, Criticism, and Application Trend of Explainable AI
abstract: In situations where explanations of black-box models may be useful, the fairness of the black-box is also often a relevant concern. However, the link between the fairness of the black-box model and the behavior of explanations for the black-box is unclear. We focus on explanations applied to tabular datasets, suggesting that explanations do not necessarily preserve the fairness properties of the black-box algorithm. In other words, explanation algorithms can ignore or obscure critical relevant properties, creating incorrect or misleading explanations. More broadly, we propose future research directions for evaluating and generating explanations such that they are informative and relevant from a fairness perspective.
summary: In situations where explanations of black-box models may be useful, the fairness of the black-box is also often a relevant concern. However, the link between the fairness of the black-box model and the behavior of explanations for the black-box is unclear. We focus on explanations applied to tabular datasets, suggesting that explanations do not necessarily preserve the fairness properties of the black-box algorithm. In other words, explanation algorithms can ignore or obscure critical relevant properties, creating incorrect or misleading explanations. More broadly, we propose future research directions for evaluating and generating explanations such that they are informative and relevant from a fairness perspective.
abstract_zh: 在黑盒模型的解释可能有用的情况下，黑盒的公平性也常常是一个相关的问题。然而，黑盒模型的公平性与黑盒解释行为之间的联系尚不清楚。我们专注于应用于表格数据集的解释，表明解释不一定保留黑盒算法的公平性。换句话说，解释算法可能会忽略或掩盖关键的相关属性，从而创建不正确或误导性的解释。更广泛地说，我们提出了评估和生成解释的未来研究方向，使它们从公平的角度提供信息和相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何生成能够保留黑箱模型公平属性的解释方法，并探讨相关研究方向。
AI.motivation: 黑箱模型的解释性与公平性存在矛盾，现有解释方法可能破坏模型公平性，导致误导性结论。
AI.method: 通过分析表格数据集上的解释算法，验证其是否保留黑箱模型的公平属性，并提出评估框架与改进方向。
AI.result: 发现解释算法可能忽略关键公平性因素，生成不准确或有偏的解释，需重新设计公平性导向的解释方法。
AI.conclusion: 未来需开发兼顾信息性与公平性的解释技术，建立系统性评估标准以确保解释的伦理可靠性。

authors_text: Mahmoud Abo Khamis,George Chichirim,Antonia Kormpa,Dan Olteanu
title: The Complexity of Boolean Conjunctive Queries with Intersection Joins
title_zh: 具有交集连接的布尔连接查询的复杂性
abstract: Intersection joins over interval data are relevant in spatial and temporal data settings. A set of intervals join if their intersection is non-empty. In case of point intervals, the intersection join becomes the standard equality join. We establish the complexity of Boolean conjunctive queries with intersection joins by a many-one equivalence to disjunctions of Boolean conjunctive queries with equality joins. The complexity of any query with intersection joins is that of the hardest query with equality joins in the disjunction exhibited by our equivalence. This is captured by a new width measure called the IJ-width. We also introduce a new syntactic notion of acyclicity called iota-acyclicity to characterise the class of Boolean queries with intersection joins that admit linear time computation modulo a poly-logarithmic factor in the data size. Iota-acyclicity is for intersection joins what alpha-acyclicity is for equality joins. It strictly sits between gamma-acyclicity and Berge-acyclicity. The intersection join queries that are not iota-acyclic are at least as hard as the Boolean triangle query with equality joins, which is widely considered not computable in linear time.
summary: Intersection joins over interval data are relevant in spatial and temporal data settings. A set of intervals join if their intersection is non-empty. In case of point intervals, the intersection join becomes the standard equality join. We establish the complexity of Boolean conjunctive queries with intersection joins by a many-one equivalence to disjunctions of Boolean conjunctive queries with equality joins. The complexity of any query with intersection joins is that of the hardest query with equality joins in the disjunction exhibited by our equivalence. This is captured by a new width measure called the IJ-width. We also introduce a new syntactic notion of acyclicity called iota-acyclicity to characterise the class of Boolean queries with intersection joins that admit linear time computation modulo a poly-logarithmic factor in the data size. Iota-acyclicity is for intersection joins what alpha-acyclicity is for equality joins. It strictly sits between gamma-acyclicity and Berge-acyclicity. The intersection join queries that are not iota-acyclic are at least as hard as the Boolean triangle query with equality joins, which is widely considered not computable in linear time.
abstract_zh: 间隔数据上的交集连接与空间和时间数据设置相关。如果交集非空，则一组间隔连接。对于点间隔，交集连接成为标准等式连接。我们通过与具有等式连接的布尔连接查询的析取的多一等价来建立具有交集连接的布尔连接查询的复杂性。任何具有交集连接的查询的复杂性是我们等价所展示的析取中最难的具有等式连接的查询的复杂性。这是通过称为 IJ 宽度的新宽度测量来捕获的。我们还引入了一种新的非循环语法概念，称为 iota-acyclity 来描述具有交集连接的布尔查询类，该类允许对数据大小的多对数因子进行线性时间计算。 Iota-无环性适用于交集连接，而 α-无环性适用于等式连接。它严格位于伽马无环性和伯格无环性之间。非 iota 无环的交集连接查询至少与具有等式连接的布尔三角形查询一样困难，后者被广泛认为在线性时间内不可计算。

AI.tldr: 本文研究布尔合取查询在交集连接下的复杂度，通过将其与等值连接的布尔合取查询的析取式建立一一对应关系，提出新的宽度度量和语法无环性概念。
AI.motivation: 交集连接在时空数据处理中具有实际意义，但其复杂度分析尚未明确。需建立理论框架以区分可线性求解与高复杂度的查询类型。
AI.method: 通过多对一等价性将交集连接查询转化为等值连接查询的析取式，定义IJ-宽度度量，并引入iota-无环性作为判定线性时间可解性的语法条件。
AI.result: 确定交集连接查询复杂度由对应析取式中最难等值连接查询决定，提出IJ-宽度度量和严格介于gamma-无环性与Berge-无环性之间的iota-无环性概念。
AI.conclusion: iota-无环性为交集连接查询提供线性时间求解的理论边界，非iota-无环查询的复杂度至少等同于等值连接的布尔三角查询，揭示了该问题的计算本质。
