search_text: The Complexity of Boolean Conjunctive Queries with Intersection Joins 具有交集连接的布尔连接查询的复杂性 Intersection joins over interval data are relevant in spatial and temporal data settings. A set of intervals join if their intersection is non-empty. In case of point intervals, the intersection join becomes the standard equality join. We establish the complexity of Boolean conjunctive queries with intersection joins by a many-one equivalence to disjunctions of Boolean conjunctive queries with equality joins. The complexity of any query with intersection joins is that of the hardest query with equality joins in the disjunction exhibited by our equivalence. This is captured by a new width measure called the IJ-width. We also introduce a new syntactic notion of acyclicity called iota-acyclicity to characterise the class of Boolean queries with intersection joins that admit linear time computation modulo a poly-logarithmic factor in the data size. Iota-acyclicity is for intersection joins what alpha-acyclicity is for equality joins. It strictly sits between gamma-acyclicity and Berge-acyclicity. The intersection join queries that are not iota-acyclic are at least as hard as the Boolean triangle query with equality joins, which is widely considered not computable in linear time. 间隔数据上的交集连接与空间和时间数据设置相关。如果交集非空，则一组间隔连接。对于点间隔，交集连接成为标准等式连接。我们通过与具有等式连接的布尔连接查询的析取的多一等价来建立具有交集连接的布尔连接查询的复杂性。任何具有交集连接的查询的复杂性是我们等价所展示的析取中最难的具有等式连接的查询的复杂性。这是通过称为 IJ 宽度的新宽度测量来捕获的。我们还引入了一种新的非循环语法概念，称为 iota-acyclity 来描述具有交集连接的布尔查询类，该类允许对数据大小的多对数因子进行线性时间计算。 Iota-无环性适用于交集连接，而 α-无环性适用于等式连接。它严格位于伽马无环性和伯格无环性之间。非 iota 无环的交集连接查询至少与具有等式连接的布尔三角形查询一样困难，后者被广泛认为在线性时间内不可计算。 本文研究布尔合取查询在交集连接下的复杂度，通过将其与等值连接的布尔合取查询的析取式建立一一对应关系，提出新的宽度度量和语法无环性概念。 Mahmoud Abo Khamis,George Chichirim,Antonia Kormpa,Dan Olteanu cs.DB,cs.DS

authors_text: Anastasios Tsolakis,Tamas Keviczky
title: Distributed IDA-PBC for a Class of Nonholonomic Mechanical Systems
title_zh: 一类非完整机械系统的分布式 IDA-PBC
comment: Longer version of a 6-page conference paper submitted to MICNON 2021 in order to illustrate more results
comments: Longer version of a 6-page conference paper submitted to MICNON 2021 in order to illustrate more results
abstract: Nonholonomic mechanical systems encompass a large class of practically interesting robotic structures, such as wheeled mobile robots, space manipulators, and multi-fingered robot hands. However, few results exist on the cooperative control of such systems in a generic, distributed approach. In this work we extend a recently developed distributed Interconnection and Damping Assignment Passivity-Based Control (IDA-PBC) method to such systems. More specifically, relying on port-Hamiltonian system modelling for networks of mechanical systems, we propose a full-state stabilization control law for a class of nonholonomic systems within the framework of distributed IDA-PBC. This enables the cooperative control of heterogeneous, underactuated and nonholonomic systems with a unified control law. This control law primarily relies on the notion of Passive Configuration Decomposition (PCD) and a novel, non-smooth desired potential energy function proposed here. A low-level collision avoidance protocol is also implemented in order to achieve dynamic inter-agent collision avoidance, enhancing the practical relevance of this work. Theoretical results are tested in different simulation scenarios in order to highlight the applicability of the derived method.
summary: Nonholonomic mechanical systems encompass a large class of practically interesting robotic structures, such as wheeled mobile robots, space manipulators, and multi-fingered robot hands. However, few results exist on the cooperative control of such systems in a generic, distributed approach. In this work we extend a recently developed distributed Interconnection and Damping Assignment Passivity-Based Control (IDA-PBC) method to such systems. More specifically, relying on port-Hamiltonian system modelling for networks of mechanical systems, we propose a full-state stabilization control law for a class of nonholonomic systems within the framework of distributed IDA-PBC. This enables the cooperative control of heterogeneous, underactuated and nonholonomic systems with a unified control law. This control law primarily relies on the notion of Passive Configuration Decomposition (PCD) and a novel, non-smooth desired potential energy function proposed here. A low-level collision avoidance protocol is also implemented in order to achieve dynamic inter-agent collision avoidance, enhancing the practical relevance of this work. Theoretical results are tested in different simulation scenarios in order to highlight the applicability of the derived method.
abstract_zh: 非完整机械系统包含一大类实际有趣的机器人结构，例如轮式移动机器人、空间操纵器和多指机器人手。然而，以通用的分布式方法对此类系统进行协作控制的结果很少。在这项工作中，我们将最近开发的分布式互连和阻尼分配基于无源性的控制（IDA-PBC）方法扩展到此类系统。更具体地说，依靠机械系统网络的端口哈密尔顿系统建模，我们在分布式 IDA-PBC 框架内提出了针对一类非完整系统的全状态稳定控制律。这使得能够利用统一的控制律对异构、欠驱动和非完整系统进行协作控制。该控制律主要依赖于被动构型分解（PCD）的概念和此处提出的新颖的非平滑期望势能函数。还实现了低级碰撞避免协议，以实现动态的代理间碰撞避免，增强了这项工作的实际相关性。理论结果在不同的仿真场景中进行了测试，以突出推导方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式IDA-PBC方法，用于非完整机械系统的协同控制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对异构、欠驱动非完整机械系统的通用分布式协同控制方法。
AI.method: 基于端口-汉密尔顿系统建模，结合被动配置分解（PCD）和非光滑期望势能函数，设计分布式IDA-PBC控制律，并集成动态避障协议。
AI.result: 通过多种仿真场景验证了理论结果，证明了该方法在非完整系统协同控制中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的控制方法能够统一实现异构非完整系统的稳定控制与动态避障，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yize Jin,Anjul Patney,Richard Webb,Alan Bovik
title: FOVQA: Blind Foveated Video Quality Assessment
title_zh: FOVQA：盲注视点视频质量评估
abstract: Previous blind or No Reference (NR) video quality assessment (VQA) models largely rely on features drawn from natural scene statistics (NSS), but under the assumption that the image statistics are stationary in the spatial domain. Several of these models are quite successful on standard pictures. However, in Virtual Reality (VR) applications, foveated video compression is regaining attention, and the concept of space-variant quality assessment is of interest, given the availability of increasingly high spatial and temporal resolution contents and practical ways of measuring gaze direction. Distortions from foveated video compression increase with increased eccentricity, implying that the natural scene statistics are space-variant. Towards advancing the development of foveated compression / streaming algorithms, we have devised a no-reference (NR) foveated video quality assessment model, called FOVQA, which is based on new models of space-variant natural scene statistics (NSS) and natural video statistics (NVS). Specifically, we deploy a space-variant generalized Gaussian distribution (SV-GGD) model and a space-variant asynchronous generalized Gaussian distribution (SV-AGGD) model of mean subtracted contrast normalized (MSCN) coefficients and products of neighboring MSCN coefficients, respectively. We devise a foveated video quality predictor that extracts radial basis features, and other features that capture perceptually annoying rapid quality fall-offs. We find that FOVQA achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the new 2D LIVE-FBT-FCVR database, as compared with other leading FIQA / VQA models. we have made our implementation of FOVQA available at: http://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/Quality/FOVQA.zip.
summary: Previous blind or No Reference (NR) video quality assessment (VQA) models largely rely on features drawn from natural scene statistics (NSS), but under the assumption that the image statistics are stationary in the spatial domain. Several of these models are quite successful on standard pictures. However, in Virtual Reality (VR) applications, foveated video compression is regaining attention, and the concept of space-variant quality assessment is of interest, given the availability of increasingly high spatial and temporal resolution contents and practical ways of measuring gaze direction. Distortions from foveated video compression increase with increased eccentricity, implying that the natural scene statistics are space-variant. Towards advancing the development of foveated compression / streaming algorithms, we have devised a no-reference (NR) foveated video quality assessment model, called FOVQA, which is based on new models of space-variant natural scene statistics (NSS) and natural video statistics (NVS). Specifically, we deploy a space-variant generalized Gaussian distribution (SV-GGD) model and a space-variant asynchronous generalized Gaussian distribution (SV-AGGD) model of mean subtracted contrast normalized (MSCN) coefficients and products of neighboring MSCN coefficients, respectively. We devise a foveated video quality predictor that extracts radial basis features, and other features that capture perceptually annoying rapid quality fall-offs. We find that FOVQA achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the new 2D LIVE-FBT-FCVR database, as compared with other leading FIQA / VQA models. we have made our implementation of FOVQA available at: http://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/Quality/FOVQA.zip.
abstract_zh: 以前的盲或无参考（NR）视频质量评估（VQA）模型很大程度上依赖于从自然场景统计（NSS）中提取的特征，但假设图像统计在空间域中是静止的。其中一些模型在标准图片上非常成功。然而，在虚拟现实（VR）应用中，注视点视频压缩正在重新引起人们的关注，并且考虑到越来越高的空间和时间分辨率内容以及测量注视方向的实用方法，空间变化质量评估的概念也引起了人们的兴趣。中心凹视频压缩的失真随着偏心率的增加而增加，这意味着自然场景统计数据是空间变化的。为了推进注视点压缩/流媒体算法的发展，我们设计了一种无参考（NR）注视点视频质量评估模型，称为 FOVQA，该模型基于空变自然场景统计（NSS）和自然视频统计（NVS）的新模型。具体来说，我们分别部署均值减去对比度归一化（MSCN）系数和相邻 MSCN 系数乘积的空变广义高斯分布（SV-GGD）模型和空变异步广义高斯分布（SV-AGGD）模型。我们设计了一个中心凹视频质量预测器，可以提取径向基特征以及其他捕获感知上烦人的快速质量下降的特征。我们发现，与其他领先的 FIQA / VQA 模型相比，FOVQA 在新的 2D LIVE-FBT-FCVR 数据库上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能。我们已经在以下位置提供了 FOVQA 的实施：http://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/Quality/FOVQA.zip。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无参考（NR）视网膜视频质量评估模型FOVQA，用于虚拟现实（VR）应用中的视网膜视频压缩质量评估。
AI.motivation: 传统无参考视频质量评估模型假设图像统计特性在空间域是静态的，但VR中的视网膜视频压缩存在空间变化的失真特性，需开发新的空间变化质量评估方法。
AI.method: 基于空间变化的自然场景统计（NSS）和自然视频统计（NVS）模型，采用空间变化广义高斯分布（SV-GGD）和异步广义高斯分布（SV-AGGD）建模MSCN系数及其邻域乘积，并提取径向基特征与快速质量下降特征。
AI.result: FOVQA在LIVE-FBT-FCVR数据库上达到最先进的性能，优于其他领先的FIQA/VQA模型。
AI.conclusion: FOVQA为视网膜压缩/流媒体算法开发提供了有效的无参考质量评估方法，推动了VR应用中高分辨率视频质量的优化。

search_text: FOVQA: Blind Foveated Video Quality Assessment FOVQA：盲注视点视频质量评估 Previous blind or No Reference (NR) video quality assessment (VQA) models largely rely on features drawn from natural scene statistics (NSS), but under the assumption that the image statistics are stationary in the spatial domain. Several of these models are quite successful on standard pictures. However, in Virtual Reality (VR) applications, foveated video compression is regaining attention, and the concept of space-variant quality assessment is of interest, given the availability of increasingly high spatial and temporal resolution contents and practical ways of measuring gaze direction. Distortions from foveated video compression increase with increased eccentricity, implying that the natural scene statistics are space-variant. Towards advancing the development of foveated compression / streaming algorithms, we have devised a no-reference (NR) foveated video quality assessment model, called FOVQA, which is based on new models of space-variant natural scene statistics (NSS) and natural video statistics (NVS). Specifically, we deploy a space-variant generalized Gaussian distribution (SV-GGD) model and a space-variant asynchronous generalized Gaussian distribution (SV-AGGD) model of mean subtracted contrast normalized (MSCN) coefficients and products of neighboring MSCN coefficients, respectively. We devise a foveated video quality predictor that extracts radial basis features, and other features that capture perceptually annoying rapid quality fall-offs. We find that FOVQA achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the new 2D LIVE-FBT-FCVR database, as compared with other leading FIQA / VQA models. we have made our implementation of FOVQA available at: http://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/Quality/FOVQA.zip. 以前的盲或无参考（NR）视频质量评估（VQA）模型很大程度上依赖于从自然场景统计（NSS）中提取的特征，但假设图像统计在空间域中是静止的。其中一些模型在标准图片上非常成功。然而，在虚拟现实（VR）应用中，注视点视频压缩正在重新引起人们的关注，并且考虑到越来越高的空间和时间分辨率内容以及测量注视方向的实用方法，空间变化质量评估的概念也引起了人们的兴趣。中心凹视频压缩的失真随着偏心率的增加而增加，这意味着自然场景统计数据是空间变化的。为了推进注视点压缩/流媒体算法的发展，我们设计了一种无参考（NR）注视点视频质量评估模型，称为 FOVQA，该模型基于空变自然场景统计（NSS）和自然视频统计（NVS）的新模型。具体来说，我们分别部署均值减去对比度归一化（MSCN）系数和相邻 MSCN 系数乘积的空变广义高斯分布（SV-GGD）模型和空变异步广义高斯分布（SV-AGGD）模型。我们设计了一个中心凹视频质量预测器，可以提取径向基特征以及其他捕获感知上烦人的快速质量下降的特征。我们发现，与其他领先的 FIQA / VQA 模型相比，FOVQA 在新的 2D LIVE-FBT-FCVR 数据库上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能。我们已经在以下位置提供了 FOVQA 的实施：http://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/Quality/FOVQA.zip。 本文提出了一种无参考（NR）视网膜视频质量评估模型FOVQA，用于虚拟现实（VR）应用中的视网膜视频压缩质量评估。 Yize Jin,Anjul Patney,Richard Webb,Alan Bovik eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: George Worrall,Anand Rangarajan,Jasmeet Judge
title: Domain-guided Machine Learning for Remotely Sensed In-Season Crop Growth Estimation
title_zh: 用于遥感当季作物生长估计的领域引导机器学习
comment: 21 pages, 7 tables, 11 figures
comments: 21 pages, 7 tables, 11 figures
abstract: Advanced machine learning techniques have been used in remote sensing (RS) applications such as crop mapping and yield prediction, but remain under-utilized for tracking crop progress. In this study, we demonstrate the use of agronomic knowledge of crop growth drivers in a Long Short-Term Memory-based, domain-guided neural network (DgNN) for in-season crop progress estimation. The DgNN uses a branched structure and attention to separate independent crop growth drivers and capture their varying importance throughout the growing season. The DgNN is implemented for corn, using RS data in Iowa for the period 2003-2019, with USDA crop progress reports used as ground truth. State-wide DgNN performance shows significant improvement over sequential and dense-only NN structures, and a widely-used Hidden Markov Model method. The DgNN had a 4.0% higher Nash-Sutfliffe efficiency over all growth stages and 39% more weeks with highest cosine similarity than the next best NN during test years. The DgNN and Sequential NN were more robust during periods of abnormal crop progress, though estimating the Silking-Grainfill transition was difficult for all methods. Finally, Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection visualizations of layer activations showed how LSTM-based NNs separate crop growth time-series differently from a dense-only structure. Results from this study exhibit both the viability of NNs in crop growth stage estimation (CGSE) and the benefits of using domain knowledge. The DgNN methodology presented here can be extended to provide near-real time CGSE of other crops.

In this study, we demonstrate the use of agronomic knowledge of crop growth drivers in a Long Short-Term Memory-based, domain-guided neural network (DgNN) for in-season crop progress estimation. The DgNN uses a branched structure and attention to separate independent crop growth drivers and capture their varying importance throughout the growing season. The DgNN is implemented for corn, using RS data in Iowa for the period 2003-2019, with USDA crop progress reports used as ground truth. State-wide DgNN performance shows significant improvement over sequential and dense-only NN structures, and a widely-used Hidden Markov Model method. The DgNN had a 4.0% higher Nash-Sutfliffe efficiency over all growth stages and 39% more weeks with highest cosine similarity than the next best NN during test years. The DgNN and Sequential NN were more robust during periods of abnormal crop progress, though estimating the Silking-Grainfill transition was difficult for all methods. Finally, Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection visualizations of layer activations showed how LSTM-based NNs separate crop growth time-series differently from a dense-only structure. Results from this study exhibit both the viability of NNs in crop growth stage estimation (CGSE) and the benefits of using domain knowledge. The DgNN methodology presented here can be extended to provide near-real time CGSE of other crops.
abstract_zh: 先进的机器学习技术已用于遥感 (RS) 应用，例如作物测绘和产量预测，但在跟踪作物进展方面仍未得到充分利用。在这项研究中，我们展示了在基于长短期记忆的领域引导神经网络（DgNN）中使用作物生长驱动因素的农艺知识来估计当季作物进展。 DgNN 使用分支结构并关注单独的独立作物生长驱动因素，并捕获它们在整个生长季节的不同重要性。 DgNN 针对玉米实施，使用爱荷华州 2003-2019 年期间的 RS 数据，并使用美国农业部作物进展报告作为基本事实。状态范围的 DgNN 性能比顺序和仅密集的 NN 结构以及广泛使用的隐马尔可夫模型方法显示出显着的改进。在测试年份中，DgNN 在所有生长阶段的 Nash-Sutfliffe 效率高出 4.0%，并且具有最高余弦相似度的周数比次佳 NN 多出 39%。尽管所有方法都难以估计吐丝-填谷转变，但 DgNN 和序列神经网络在作物生长异常期间更加稳健。最后，层激活的均匀流形逼近和投影可视化展示了基于 LSTM 的神经网络如何以与仅稠密结构不同的方式分离作物生长时间序列。这项研究的结果展示了神经网络在作物生长阶段估计 (CGSE) 中的可行性以及使用领域知识的好处。这里介绍的 DgNN 方法可以扩展以提供其他作物的近实时 CGSE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合农业知识的深度神经网络（DgNN），用于利用遥感数据实时估算作物生长阶段。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在遥感领域应用广泛，但作物生长过程的动态跟踪仍依赖传统统计模型，缺乏对领域知识的有效整合。
AI.method: 构建基于LSTM的领域引导神经网络（DgNN），通过分支结构与注意力机制分离作物生长驱动因素，使用2003-2019年爱荷华州玉米遥感数据与USDA报告进行训练与验证。
AI.result: DgNN在纳什-苏特cliffe效率指标上比其他模型提升4%，在39%的测试周中达到最高余弦相似度，且在异常生长条件下表现更稳健，但对授粉-灌浆转换阶段预测仍存在困难。
AI.conclusion: 领域知识引导的神经网络有效提升了作物生长阶段估算精度，该方法可扩展至其他作物的近实时监测。

authors_text: Saveli Goldberg,Stanislav Belyaev,Vladimir Sluchak
title: Dr. Watson type Artificial Intellect (AI) Systems
title_zh: 沃森博士型人工智能（AI）系统
comment: 24 pages,13 figures
comments: 24 pages,13 figures
abstract: The article proposes a new type of AI system that does not give solutions directly but rather points toward it, friendly prompting the user with questions and adjusting messages. Models of AI human collaboration can be deduced from the classic literary example of interaction between Mr. Holmes and Dr. Watson from the stories by Conan Doyle, where the highly qualified expert Mr. Holmes answers questions posed by Dr. Watson. Here Mr. Holmes, with his rule-based calculations, logic, and memory management, apparently plays the role of an AI system, and Dr. Watson is the user. Looking into the same Holmes-Watson interaction, we find and promote another model in which the AI behaves like Dr. Watson, who, by asking questions and acting in a particular way, helps Holmes (the AI user) make the right decisions. We call the systems based on this principle "Dr. Watson-type systems." The article describes the properties of such systems and introduces two particular: Patient Management System for intensive care physicians and Data Error Prevention System.
summary: The article proposes a new type of AI system that does not give solutions directly but rather points toward it, friendly prompting the user with questions and adjusting messages. Models of AI human collaboration can be deduced from the classic literary example of interaction between Mr. Holmes and Dr. Watson from the stories by Conan Doyle, where the highly qualified expert Mr. Holmes answers questions posed by Dr. Watson. Here Mr. Holmes, with his rule-based calculations, logic, and memory management, apparently plays the role of an AI system, and Dr. Watson is the user. Looking into the same Holmes-Watson interaction, we find and promote another model in which the AI behaves like Dr. Watson, who, by asking questions and acting in a particular way, helps Holmes (the AI user) make the right decisions. We call the systems based on this principle "Dr. Watson-type systems." The article describes the properties of such systems and introduces two particular: Patient Management System for intensive care physicians and Data Error Prevention System.
abstract_zh: 文章提出了一种新型的人工智能系统，它不直接给出解决方案，而是指向解决方案，友好地提示用户问题并调整消息。人工智能人类协作的模式可以从柯南道尔的故事中福尔摩斯先生和华生医生互动的经典文学例子中推导出来，高素质的专家福尔摩斯先生回答了华生医生提出的问题。在这里，福尔摩斯先生凭借基于规则的计算、逻辑和内存管理，显然扮演了人工智能系统的角色，而沃森博士则是用户。通过研究同样的福尔摩斯-沃森交互，我们发现并推广了另一种模型，其中人工智能的行为就像沃森博士一样，沃森博士通过提出问题并以特定的方式行动，帮助福尔摩斯（人工智能用户）做出正确的决定。我们将基于这一原理的系统称为“沃森博士型系统”。本文描述了此类系统的属性，并介绍了两个特别的系统：重症监护医生的患者管理系统和数据错误预防系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型AI系统，通过提问和引导用户而非直接提供答案，借鉴福尔摩斯与华生的互动模式，设计两种协作模型并开发两个应用系统。
AI.motivation: 传统AI常直接输出答案，忽视用户主动思考过程，而人类专家与助手的协作模式能更有效促进决策，需探索AI如何通过引导式交互提升用户参与度与决策质量。
AI.method: 基于文学案例分析福尔摩斯与华生的互动，提炼两种AI协作模型：1) AI作为专家直接解答用户问题；2) AI作为助手通过提问辅助用户决策。据此设计Dr. Watson型系统框架，并开发具体应用。
AI.result: 提出Dr. Watson型系统的特性，开发出重症监护患者管理系统与数据错误预防系统两个实例，验证了引导式交互在医疗与数据领域的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Dr. Watson型AI系统通过模拟人类协作模式，以提问引导用户思考，可提升复杂场景下的决策质量，适用于医疗、数据等需深度交互的领域。

search_text: Dr. Watson type Artificial Intellect (AI) Systems 沃森博士型人工智能（AI）系统 The article proposes a new type of AI system that does not give solutions directly but rather points toward it, friendly prompting the user with questions and adjusting messages. Models of AI human collaboration can be deduced from the classic literary example of interaction between Mr. Holmes and Dr. Watson from the stories by Conan Doyle, where the highly qualified expert Mr. Holmes answers questions posed by Dr. Watson. Here Mr. Holmes, with his rule-based calculations, logic, and memory management, apparently plays the role of an AI system, and Dr. Watson is the user. Looking into the same Holmes-Watson interaction, we find and promote another model in which the AI behaves like Dr. Watson, who, by asking questions and acting in a particular way, helps Holmes (the AI user) make the right decisions. We call the systems based on this principle "Dr. Watson-type systems." The article describes the properties of such systems and introduces two particular: Patient Management System for intensive care physicians and Data Error Prevention System. 文章提出了一种新型的人工智能系统，它不直接给出解决方案，而是指向解决方案，友好地提示用户问题并调整消息。人工智能人类协作的模式可以从柯南道尔的故事中福尔摩斯先生和华生医生互动的经典文学例子中推导出来，高素质的专家福尔摩斯先生回答了华生医生提出的问题。在这里，福尔摩斯先生凭借基于规则的计算、逻辑和内存管理，显然扮演了人工智能系统的角色，而沃森博士则是用户。通过研究同样的福尔摩斯-沃森交互，我们发现并推广了另一种模型，其中人工智能的行为就像沃森博士一样，沃森博士通过提出问题并以特定的方式行动，帮助福尔摩斯（人工智能用户）做出正确的决定。我们将基于这一原理的系统称为“沃森博士型系统”。本文描述了此类系统的属性，并介绍了两个特别的系统：重症监护医生的患者管理系统和数据错误预防系统。 本文提出一种新型AI系统，通过提问和引导用户而非直接提供答案，借鉴福尔摩斯与华生的互动模式，设计两种协作模型并开发两个应用系统。 Saveli Goldberg,Stanislav Belyaev,Vladimir Sluchak cs.AI

authors_text: Irina Basieva,Vijitashwa Pandey,Polina Khrennikova
title: More Causes Less Effect: Destructive Interference in Decision Making
title_zh: 原因较多，影响较小：决策过程中的破坏性干扰
abstract: We present a new experiment demonstrating destructive interference in customers' estimates of conditional probabilities of product failure. We take the perspective of a manufacturer of consumer products, and consider two situations of cause and effect. Whereas individually the effect of the causes is similar, it is observed that when combined, the two causes produce the opposite effect. Such negative interference of two or more reasons may be exploited for better modeling the cognitive processes taking place in the customers' mind. Doing so can enhance the likelihood that a manufacturer will be able to design a better product, or a feature within it. Quantum probability has been used to explain some commonly observed deviations such as question order and response replicability effects, as well as in explaining paradoxes such as violations of the sure-thing principle, and Machina and Ellsberg paradoxes. In this work, we present results from a survey conducted regarding the effect of multiple observed symptoms on the drivability of a vehicle. We demonstrate that the set of responses cannot be explained using classical probability, but quantum formulation easily models it, as it allows for both positive and negative "interference" between events. Since quantum formulism also accounts for classical probability's predictions, it serves as a richer paradigm for modeling decision making behavior in engineering design and behavioral economics.
summary: We present a new experiment demonstrating destructive interference in customers' estimates of conditional probabilities of product failure. We take the perspective of a manufacturer of consumer products, and consider two situations of cause and effect. Whereas individually the effect of the causes is similar, it is observed that when combined, the two causes produce the opposite effect. Such negative interference of two or more reasons may be exploited for better modeling the cognitive processes taking place in the customers' mind. Doing so can enhance the likelihood that a manufacturer will be able to design a better product, or a feature within it. Quantum probability has been used to explain some commonly observed deviations such as question order and response replicability effects, as well as in explaining paradoxes such as violations of the sure-thing principle, and Machina and Ellsberg paradoxes. In this work, we present results from a survey conducted regarding the effect of multiple observed symptoms on the drivability of a vehicle. We demonstrate that the set of responses cannot be explained using classical probability, but quantum formulation easily models it, as it allows for both positive and negative "interference" between events. Since quantum formulism also accounts for classical probability's predictions, it serves as a richer paradigm for modeling decision making behavior in engineering design and behavioral economics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项新实验，证明了客户对产品故障条件概率的估计存在破坏性干扰。我们站在消费品制造商的角度，考虑因果关系两种情况。虽然单独来看，原因的影响是相似的，但观察到，当两​​个原因结合起来时，会产生相反的效果。可以利用两个或更多个原因的这种负面干扰来更好地对顾客头脑中发生的认知过程进行建模。这样做可以提高制造商设计出更好的产品或其功能的可能性。量子概率已被用来解释一些常见的偏差，例如问题顺序和响应可复制性效应，以及解释悖论，例如违反确定性原则、Machina 和 Ellsberg 悖论。在这项工作中，我们展示了一项关于多种观察到的症状对车辆驾驶性能的影响的调查结果。我们证明，这组反应不能用经典概率来解释，但量子公式很容易对其进行建模，因为它允许事件之间存在积极和消极的“干扰”。由于量子公式主义也解释了经典概率的预测，因此它可以作为工程设计和行为经济学中决策行为建模的更丰富的范式。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验展示顾客在评估产品故障条件概率时存在破坏性干扰现象，并利用量子概率理论建模解释该现象。
AI.motivation: 传统概率模型无法解释人类决策中的认知偏差，需寻找更符合心理机制的理论框架以优化产品设计。
AI.method: 设计车辆驾驶性能调查实验，收集多症状联合影响的判断数据，并对比经典概率与量子概率模型的解释力。
AI.result: 经典概率无法解释调查结果，而量子概率模型通过正负干涉效应成功拟合数据，验证了认知干扰的存在。
AI.conclusion: 量子概率理论为工程设计和行为经济学中的决策建模提供了更全面的范式，可有效捕捉人类认知的非经典特征。

authors_text: Rui Yao,Shlomo Bekhor
title: A variational autoencoder approach for choice set generation and implicit perception of alternatives in choice modeling
title_zh: 用于选择集生成和选择建模中替代方案隐式感知的变分自动编码器方法
abstract: This paper derives the generalized extreme value (GEV) model with implicit availability/perception (IAP) of alternatives and proposes a variational autoencoder (VAE) approach for choice set generation and implicit perception of alternatives. Specifically, the cross-nested logit (CNL) model with IAP is derived as an example of IAP-GEV models. The VAE approach is adapted to model the choice set generation process, in which the likelihood of perceiving chosen alternatives in the choice set is maximized. The VAE approach for route choice set generation is exemplified using a real dataset. IAP- CNL model estimated has the best performance in terms of goodness-of-fit and prediction performance, compared to multinomial logit models and conventional choice set generation methods.
summary: This paper derives the generalized extreme value (GEV) model with implicit availability/perception (IAP) of alternatives and proposes a variational autoencoder (VAE) approach for choice set generation and implicit perception of alternatives. Specifically, the cross-nested logit (CNL) model with IAP is derived as an example of IAP-GEV models. The VAE approach is adapted to model the choice set generation process, in which the likelihood of perceiving chosen alternatives in the choice set is maximized. The VAE approach for route choice set generation is exemplified using a real dataset. IAP- CNL model estimated has the best performance in terms of goodness-of-fit and prediction performance, compared to multinomial logit models and conventional choice set generation methods.
abstract_zh: 本文推导了具有替代方案隐式可用性/感知（IAP）的广义极值（GEV）模型，并提出了一种用于选择集生成和替代方案隐式感知的变分自动编码器（VAE）方法。具体来说，派生了具有 IAP 的交叉嵌套 logit (CNL) 模型作为 IAP-GEV 模型的示例。 VAE 方法适用于对选择集生成过程进行建模，其中在选择集中感知选定替代方案的可能性最大化。用于生成路线选择集的 VAE 方法使用真实数据集进行了举例说明。与多项 Logit 模型和传统选择集生成方法相比，IAP-CNL 模型估计在拟合优度和预测性能方面具有最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的方法，用于生成选择集并隐式感知替代选项，改进传统选择建模方法。
AI.motivation: 传统选择模型难以有效处理隐式感知替代选项的问题，且现有方法在拟合优度和预测性能上存在不足。
AI.method: 结合广义极值（GEV）模型与VAE，推导出带有隐式可用性/感知（IAP）的交叉嵌套逻辑（CNL）模型，并通过最大化选择集感知概率优化VAE生成过程。
AI.result: IAP-CN模型在拟合优度和预测性能上优于多项逻辑模型及传统选择集生成方法，实证数据验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: VAE方法能有效捕捉选择集生成中的隐式感知机制，为选择建模提供更优解决方案。

motivation: 传统选择模型难以有效处理隐式感知替代选项的问题，且现有方法在拟合优度和预测性能上存在不足。
method: 结合广义极值（GEV）模型与VAE，推导出带有隐式可用性/感知（IAP）的交叉嵌套逻辑（CNL）模型，并通过最大化选择集感知概率优化VAE生成过程。
result: IAP-CN模型在拟合优度和预测性能上优于多项逻辑模型及传统选择集生成方法，实证数据验证了其有效性。
conclusion: VAE方法能有效捕捉选择集生成中的隐式感知机制，为选择建模提供更优解决方案。
search_text: A variational autoencoder approach for choice set generation and implicit perception of alternatives in choice modeling 用于选择集生成和选择建模中替代方案隐式感知的变分自动编码器方法 This paper derives the generalized extreme value (GEV) model with implicit availability/perception (IAP) of alternatives and proposes a variational autoencoder (VAE) approach for choice set generation and implicit perception of alternatives. Specifically, the cross-nested logit (CNL) model with IAP is derived as an example of IAP-GEV models. The VAE approach is adapted to model the choice set generation process, in which the likelihood of perceiving chosen alternatives in the choice set is maximized. The VAE approach for route choice set generation is exemplified using a real dataset. IAP- CNL model estimated has the best performance in terms of goodness-of-fit and prediction performance, compared to multinomial logit models and conventional choice set generation methods. 本文推导了具有替代方案隐式可用性/感知（IAP）的广义极值（GEV）模型，并提出了一种用于选择集生成和替代方案隐式感知的变分自动编码器（VAE）方法。具体来说，派生了具有 IAP 的交叉嵌套 logit (CNL) 模型作为 IAP-GEV 模型的示例。 VAE 方法适用于对选择集生成过程进行建模，其中在选择集中感知选定替代方案的可能性最大化。用于生成路线选择集的 VAE 方法使用真实数据集进行了举例说明。与多项 Logit 模型和传统选择集生成方法相比，IAP-CNL 模型估计在拟合优度和预测性能方面具有最佳性能。 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的方法，用于生成选择集并隐式感知替代选项，改进传统选择建模方法。 Rui Yao,Shlomo Bekhor cs.AI,cs.LG,physics.soc-ph,stat.ME

authors_text: Angela F. Gao,Brandon Rasmussen,Peter Kulits,Eva L. Scheller,Rebecca Greenberger,Bethany L. Ehlmann
title: Generalized Unsupervised Clustering of Hyperspectral Images of Geological Targets in the Near Infrared
title_zh: 近红外地质目标高光谱图像的广义无监督聚类
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. Accepted, CVPR PBVS Workshop 2021
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures. Accepted, CVPR PBVS Workshop 2021
abstract: The application of infrared hyperspectral imagery to geological problems is becoming more popular as data become more accessible and cost-effective. Clustering and classifying spectrally similar materials is often a first step in applications ranging from economic mineral exploration on Earth to planetary exploration on Mars. Semi-manual classification guided by expertly developed spectral parameters can be time consuming and biased, while supervised methods require abundant labeled data and can be difficult to generalize. Here we develop a fully unsupervised workflow for feature extraction and clustering informed by both expert spectral geologist input and quantitative metrics. Our pipeline uses a lightweight autoencoder followed by Gaussian mixture modeling to map the spectral diversity within any image. We validate the performance of our pipeline at submillimeter-scale with expert-labelled data from the Oman ophiolite drill core and evaluate performance at meters-scale with partially classified orbital data of Jezero Crater on Mars (the landing site for the Perseverance rover). We additionally examine the effects of various preprocessing techniques used in traditional analysis of hyperspectral imagery. This pipeline provides a fast and accurate clustering map of similar geological materials and consistently identifies and separates major mineral classes in both laboratory imagery and remote sensing imagery. We refer to our pipeline as "Generalized Pipeline for Spectroscopic Unsupervised clustering of Minerals (GyPSUM)."
summary: The application of infrared hyperspectral imagery to geological problems is becoming more popular as data become more accessible and cost-effective. Clustering and classifying spectrally similar materials is often a first step in applications ranging from economic mineral exploration on Earth to planetary exploration on Mars. Here we develop a fully unsupervised workflow for feature extraction and clustering informed by both expert spectral geologist input and quantitative metrics. We validate the performance of our pipeline at submillimeter-scale with expert-labelled data from the Oman ophiolite drill core and evaluate performance at meters-scale with partially classified orbital data of Jezero Crater on Mars (the landing site for the Perseverance rover). We additionally examine the effects of various preprocessing techniques used in traditional analysis of hyperspectral imagery. This pipeline provides a fast and accurate clustering map of similar geological materials and consistently identifies and separates major mineral classes in both laboratory imagery and remote sensing imagery. We refer to our pipeline as "Generalized Pipeline for Spectroscopic Unsupervised clustering of Minerals (GyPSUM)."
abstract_zh: 随着数据变得更容易获取和更具成本效益，红外高光谱图像在地质问题中的应用变得越来越流行。对光谱相似的材料进行聚类和分类通常是从地球上的经济矿物勘探到火星上的行星勘探等应用的第一步。由专业开发的光谱参数指导的半手动分类可能非常耗时且存在偏差，而监督方法需要丰富的标记数据并且可能难以推广。在这里，我们开发了一个完全无人监督的工作流程，用于特征提取和聚类，由专家光谱地质学家输入和定量指标提供信息。我们的管道使用轻量级自动编码器，然后进行高斯混合建模来映射任何图像内的光谱多样性。我们利用阿曼蛇绿岩钻芯的专家标记数据在亚毫米级验证了管道的性能，并利用火星 Jezero 陨石坑（毅力号火星车着陆点）的部分分类轨道数据评估了米级性能。我们还研究了传统高光谱图像分析中使用的各种预处理技术的效果。该管道提供了类似地质材料的快速、准确的聚类图，并一致地识别和分离实验室图像和遥感图像中的主要矿物类别。我们将我们的管道称为“矿物光谱无监督聚类的通用管道 (GyPSUM)”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于地质目标近红外高光谱图像的通用无监督聚类方法。
AI.motivation: 红外高光谱图像在地质问题中的应用日益广泛，但现有的分类方法存在耗时、依赖专家经验和需要大量标注数据的问题。
AI.method: 本文开发了一种完全无监督的工作流程，结合专家光谱地质学家的输入和定量指标，使用轻量级自编码器和高斯混合模型进行特征提取和聚类。
AI.result: 该方法在实验室图像和遥感图像中均能快速准确地生成相似地质材料的聚类图，并一致识别和分离主要矿物类别。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为地质材料的无监督聚类提供了一种高效且通用的解决方案，适用于不同尺度的数据集。

authors_text: Anita Mahinpei,Justin Clark,Isaac Lage,Finale Doshi-Velez,Weiwei Pan
title: Promises and Pitfalls of Black-Box Concept Learning Models
title_zh: 黑盒概念学习模型的前景和陷阱
abstract: Machine learning models that incorporate concept learning as an intermediate step in their decision making process can match the performance of black-box predictive models while retaining the ability to explain outcomes in human understandable terms. However, we demonstrate that the concept representations learned by these models encode information beyond the pre-defined concepts, and that natural mitigation strategies do not fully work, rendering the interpretation of the downstream prediction misleading. We describe the mechanism underlying the information leakage and suggest recourse for mitigating its effects.
summary: Machine learning models that incorporate concept learning as an intermediate step in their decision making process can match the performance of black-box predictive models while retaining the ability to explain outcomes in human understandable terms. However, we demonstrate that the concept representations learned by these models encode information beyond the pre-defined concepts, and that natural mitigation strategies do not fully work, rendering the interpretation of the downstream prediction misleading. We describe the mechanism underlying the information leakage and suggest recourse for mitigating its effects.
abstract_zh: 将概念学习作为决策过程中间步骤的机器学习模型可以与黑盒预测模型的性能相匹配，同时保留以人类可理解的术语解释结果的能力。然而，我们证明这些模型学习的概念表示编码的信息超出了预定义的概念，并且自然缓解策略不能完全发挥作用，从而使下游预测的解释产生误导。我们描述了信息泄漏的机制，并建议采取措施减轻其影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将概念学习作为中间步骤的机器学习模型在保持预测性能的同时，其概念表示可能泄露额外信息导致解释误导的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有概念学习模型虽具备可解释性，但其解释的准确性可能存在隐患，需验证其可靠性并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 通过分析概念学习模型的表示机制，揭示信息泄露路径，并设计实验验证缓解策略的有效性。
AI.result: 发现模型概念表示会隐含超出预定义概念的信息，现有缓解方法无法完全消除该问题，导致解释偏差。
AI.conclusion: 概念学习模型在可解释性与准确性间存在矛盾，需进一步研究更有效的信息泄露控制方法。

authors_text: Beatriz Moya,Alberto Badias,David Gonzalez,Francisco Chinesta,Elias Cueto
title: Physics perception in sloshing scenes with guaranteed thermodynamic consistency
title_zh: 晃动场景中的物理感知，并保证热力学一致性
comment: 21 pages, 12 figures
comments: 21 pages, 12 figures
abstract: Physics perception very often faces the problem that only limited data or partial measurements on the scene are available. In this work, we propose a strategy to learn the full state of sloshing liquids from measurements of the free surface. Our approach is based on recurrent neural networks (RNN) that project the limited information available to a reduced-order manifold so as to not only reconstruct the unknown information, but also to be capable of performing fluid reasoning about future scenarios in real time. To obtain physically consistent predictions, we train deep neural networks on the reduced-order manifold that, through the employ of inductive biases, ensure the fulfillment of the principles of thermodynamics. RNNs learn from history the required hidden information to correlate the limited information with the latent space where the simulation occurs. Finally, a decoder returns data back to the high-dimensional manifold, so as to provide the user with insightful information in the form of augmented reality. This algorithm is connected to a computer vision system to test the performance of the proposed methodology with real information, resulting in a system capable of understanding and predicting future states of the observed fluid in real-time.
summary: Physics perception very often faces the problem that only limited data or partial measurements on the scene are available. In this work, we propose a strategy to learn the full state of sloshing liquids from measurements of the free surface. Our approach is based on recurrent neural networks (RNN) that project the limited information available to a reduced-order manifold so as to not only reconstruct the unknown information, but also to be capable of performing fluid reasoning about future scenarios in real time. To obtain physically consistent predictions, we train deep neural networks on the reduced-order manifold that, through the employ of inductive biases, ensure the fulfillment of the principles of thermodynamics. RNNs learn from history the required hidden information to correlate the limited information with the latent space where the simulation occurs. Finally, a decoder returns data back to the high-dimensional manifold, so as to provide the user with insightful information in the form of augmented reality. This algorithm is connected to a computer vision system to test the performance of the proposed methodology with real information, resulting in a system capable of understanding and predicting future states of the observed fluid in real-time.
abstract_zh: 物理感知经常面临这样的问题：场景中只有有限的数据或部分测量结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种策略，通过自由表面的测量来了解晃动液体的完整状态。我们的方法基于循环神经网络（RNN），它将可用的有限信息投射到降阶流形，以便不仅重建未知信息，而且能够实时对未来场景进行流体推理。为了获得物理上一致的预测，我们在降阶流形上训练深度神经网络，通过使用归纳偏差，确保热力学原理的实现。 RNN 从历史中学习所需的隐藏信息，以将有限的信息与模拟发生的潜在空间相关联。最后，解码器将数据返回到高维流形，从而以增强现实的形式为用户提供有洞察力的信息。该算法连接到计算机视觉系统，用真实信息测试所提出方法的性能，从而形成一个能够实时理解和预测所观察流体的未来状态的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环神经网络（RNN）和热力学约束的物理感知方法，通过自由表面测量重建液体晃动场景的完整状态并预测未来状态。
AI.motivation: 传统物理感知方法在数据有限或部分测量时难以准确重建液体状态，且缺乏对热力学原理的保证，导致预测结果可能违反物理规律。
AI.method: 利用RNN将自由表面测量数据投影到低维流形，结合归纳偏置训练深度网络以满足热力学定律，通过历史信息学习隐含关联，解码器将结果映射回高维空间并与计算机视觉系统集成。
AI.result: 构建的系统可实时理解并预测液体晃动状态，在真实场景测试中验证了方法的有效性与物理一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合数据驱动模型与物理约束，实现了对液体场景的精确感知与预测，为增强现实等应用提供了可靠的技术支持。

search_text: Physics perception in sloshing scenes with guaranteed thermodynamic consistency 晃动场景中的物理感知，并保证热力学一致性 Physics perception very often faces the problem that only limited data or partial measurements on the scene are available. In this work, we propose a strategy to learn the full state of sloshing liquids from measurements of the free surface. Our approach is based on recurrent neural networks (RNN) that project the limited information available to a reduced-order manifold so as to not only reconstruct the unknown information, but also to be capable of performing fluid reasoning about future scenarios in real time. To obtain physically consistent predictions, we train deep neural networks on the reduced-order manifold that, through the employ of inductive biases, ensure the fulfillment of the principles of thermodynamics. RNNs learn from history the required hidden information to correlate the limited information with the latent space where the simulation occurs. Finally, a decoder returns data back to the high-dimensional manifold, so as to provide the user with insightful information in the form of augmented reality. This algorithm is connected to a computer vision system to test the performance of the proposed methodology with real information, resulting in a system capable of understanding and predicting future states of the observed fluid in real-time. 物理感知经常面临这样的问题：场景中只有有限的数据或部分测量结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种策略，通过自由表面的测量来了解晃动液体的完整状态。我们的方法基于循环神经网络（RNN），它将可用的有限信息投射到降阶流形，以便不仅重建未知信息，而且能够实时对未来场景进行流体推理。为了获得物理上一致的预测，我们在降阶流形上训练深度神经网络，通过使用归纳偏差，确保热力学原理的实现。 RNN 从历史中学习所需的隐藏信息，以将有限的信息与模拟发生的潜在空间相关联。最后，解码器将数据返回到高维流形，从而以增强现实的形式为用户提供有洞察力的信息。该算法连接到计算机视觉系统，用真实信息测试所提出方法的性能，从而形成一个能够实时理解和预测所观察流体的未来状态的系统。 本文提出一种基于循环神经网络（RNN）和热力学约束的物理感知方法，通过自由表面测量重建液体晃动场景的完整状态并预测未来状态。 Beatriz Moya,Alberto Badias,David Gonzalez,Francisco Chinesta,Elias Cueto cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Julien Philip,Sébastien Morgenthaler,Michaël Gharbi,George Drettakis
title: Free-viewpoint Indoor Neural Relighting from Multi-view Stereo
title_zh: 多视点立体的自由视点室内神经重新照明
comment: ef:ACM Transactions on Graphics (2021)
comments: ef:ACM Transactions on Graphics (2021)
abstract: We introduce a neural relighting algorithm for captured indoors scenes, that allows interactive free-viewpoint navigation. Our method allows illumination to be changed synthetically, while coherently rendering cast shadows and complex glossy materials. We start with multiple images of the scene and a 3D mesh obtained by multi-view stereo (MVS) reconstruction. We assume that lighting is well-explained as the sum of a view-independent diffuse component and a view-dependent glossy term concentrated around the mirror reflection direction. We design a convolutional network around input feature maps that facilitate learning of an implicit representation of scene materials and illumination, enabling both relighting and free-viewpoint navigation. We generate these input maps by exploiting the best elements of both image-based and physically-based rendering. We sample the input views to estimate diffuse scene irradiance, and compute the new illumination caused by user-specified light sources using path tracing. To facilitate the network's understanding of materials and synthesize plausible glossy reflections, we reproject the views and compute mirror images. We train the network on a synthetic dataset where each scene is also reconstructed with MVS. We show results of our algorithm relighting real indoor scenes and performing free-viewpoint navigation with complex and realistic glossy reflections, which so far remained out of reach for view-synthesis techniques.
summary: We introduce a neural relighting algorithm for captured indoors scenes, that allows interactive free-viewpoint navigation. Our method allows illumination to be changed synthetically, while coherently rendering cast shadows and complex glossy materials. We start with multiple images of the scene and a 3D mesh obtained by multi-view stereo (MVS) reconstruction. We assume that lighting is well-explained as the sum of a view-independent diffuse component and a view-dependent glossy term concentrated around the mirror reflection direction. We design a convolutional network around input feature maps that facilitate learning of an implicit representation of scene materials and illumination, enabling both relighting and free-viewpoint navigation. We generate these input maps by exploiting the best elements of both image-based and physically-based rendering. We sample the input views to estimate diffuse scene irradiance, and compute the new illumination caused by user-specified light sources using path tracing. To facilitate the network's understanding of materials and synthesize plausible glossy reflections, we reproject the views and compute mirror images. We train the network on a synthetic dataset where each scene is also reconstructed with MVS. We show results of our algorithm relighting real indoor scenes and performing free-viewpoint navigation with complex and realistic glossy reflections, which so far remained out of reach for view-synthesis techniques.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于捕捉室内场景的神经重新照明算法，该算法允许交互式自由视点导航。我们的方法允许综合改变照明，同时连贯地渲染投射阴影和复杂的光泽材质。我们从场景的多个图像和通过多视图立体 (MVS) 重建获得的 3D 网格开始。我们假设照明可以很好地解释为与视图无关的漫反射分量和集中在镜面反射方向周围的与视图相关的光泽项的总和。我们围绕输入特征图设计了一个卷积网络，有助于学习场景材质和照明的隐式表示，从而实现重新照明和自由视点导航。我们通过利用基于图像和基于物理的渲染的最佳元素来生成这些输入地图。我们对输入视图进行采样以估计漫反射场景辐照度，并使用路径跟踪计算由用户指定的光源引起的新照明。为了促进网络对材料的理解并合成合理的光泽反射，我们重新投影视图并计算镜像。我们在合成数据集上训练网络，其中每个场景也使用 MVS 重建。我们展示了我们的算法的结果，该算法重新照亮了真实的室内场景，并通过复杂而逼真的光泽反射执行自由视点导航，而迄今为止，这对于视图合成技术来说仍然是遥不可及的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角立体视觉的室内神经重照明算法，支持交互式自由视角导航。
AI.motivation: 传统视图合成技术难以处理复杂镜面反射和动态光照变化，需实现真实感室内场景的自由视角重照明。
AI.method: 结合多视角立体重建（MVS）与卷积网络，将光照分解为视角无关的漫反射和视角相关的镜面反射成分，通过路径追踪与镜像重投影学习材料特性。
AI.result: 在真实室内场景中实现复杂镜面反射的自由视角重照明，优于现有视图合成技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合几何重建与神经渲染，有效解决了动态光照下复杂材质的视图合成难题。

authors_text: Xiao Liu,Spyridon Thermos,Alison O'Neil,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris
title: Semi-supervised Meta-learning with Disentanglement for Domain-generalised Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于领域广义医学图像分割的半监督元学习与解纠缠
comment: MICCAI 2021 Oral
comments: MICCAI 2021 Oral
abstract: Generalising deep models to new data from new centres (termed here domains) remains a challenge. This is largely attributed to shifts in data statistics (domain shifts) between source and unseen domains. Recently, gradient-based meta-learning approaches where the training data are split into meta-train and meta-test sets to simulate and handle the domain shifts during training have shown improved generalisation performance. However, the current fully supervised meta-learning approaches are not scalable for medical image segmentation, where large effort is required to create pixel-wise annotations. Meanwhile, in a low data regime, the simulated domain shifts may not approximate the true domain shifts well across source and unseen domains. To address this problem, we propose a novel semi-supervised meta-learning framework with disentanglement. We explicitly model the representations related to domain shifts. Disentangling the representations and combining them to reconstruct the input image allows unlabeled data to be used to better approximate the true domain shifts for meta-learning. Hence, the model can achieve better generalisation performance, especially when there is a limited amount of labeled data. Experiments show that the proposed method is robust on different segmentation tasks and achieves state-of-the-art generalisation performance on two public benchmarks.
summary: Generalising deep models to new data from new centres (termed here domains) remains a challenge. This is largely attributed to shifts in data statistics (domain shifts) between source and unseen domains. Recently, gradient-based meta-learning approaches where the training data are split into meta-train and meta-test sets to simulate and handle the domain shifts during training have shown improved generalisation performance. However, the current fully supervised meta-learning approaches are not scalable for medical image segmentation, where large effort is required to create pixel-wise annotations. Meanwhile, in a low data regime, the simulated domain shifts may not approximate the true domain shifts well across source and unseen domains. To address this problem, we propose a novel semi-supervised meta-learning framework with disentanglement. We explicitly model the representations related to domain shifts. Disentangling the representations and combining them to reconstruct the input image allows unlabeled data to be used to better approximate the true domain shifts for meta-learning. Hence, the model can achieve better generalisation performance, especially when there is a limited amount of labeled data. Experiments show that the proposed method is robust on different segmentation tasks and achieves state-of-the-art generalisation performance on two public benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 将深度模型推广到来自新中心（此处称为域）的新数据仍然是一个挑战。这很大程度上归因于源域和未见域之间的数据统计变化（域转移）。最近，基于梯度的元学习方法（将训练数据分为元训练集和元测试集以模拟和处理训练期间的域转换）已显示出改进的泛化性能。然而，当前完全监督的元学习方法对于医学图像分割来说不可扩展，需要付出巨大的努力来创建像素级注释。同时，在低数据状态下，模拟的域移位可能无法很好地接近源域和未见域之间的真实域移位。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的具有解缠结的半监督元学习框架。我们明确地对与域转移相关的表示进行建模。解开表示并将它们组合起来重建输入图像，允许使用未标记的数据更好地近似元学习的真实域移位。因此，该模型可以获得更好的泛化性能，特别是当标记数据量有限时。实验表明，所提出的方法在不同的分割任务上具有鲁棒性，并且在两个公共基准上实现了最先进的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合解耦的半监督元学习框架，用于提高医疗图像分割的领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有全监督元学习方法在医疗图像分割中因需要大量像素级标注而难以扩展，且在低数据场景下模拟的领域偏移无法准确反映真实偏移。
AI.method: 通过显式建模与领域偏移相关的解耦表征，并结合未标注数据重建输入图像，以更准确逼近真实领域偏移，提升元学习的泛化性能。
AI.result: 该方法在不同分割任务中表现稳健，在两个公开基准测试中达到最先进的领域泛化性能。

search_text: Semi-supervised Meta-learning with Disentanglement for Domain-generalised Medical Image Segmentation 用于领域广义医学图像分割的半监督元学习与解纠缠 Generalising deep models to new data from new centres (termed here domains) remains a challenge. This is largely attributed to shifts in data statistics (domain shifts) between source and unseen domains. Recently, gradient-based meta-learning approaches where the training data are split into meta-train and meta-test sets to simulate and handle the domain shifts during training have shown improved generalisation performance. However, the current fully supervised meta-learning approaches are not scalable for medical image segmentation, where large effort is required to create pixel-wise annotations. Meanwhile, in a low data regime, the simulated domain shifts may not approximate the true domain shifts well across source and unseen domains. To address this problem, we propose a novel semi-supervised meta-learning framework with disentanglement. We explicitly model the representations related to domain shifts. Disentangling the representations and combining them to reconstruct the input image allows unlabeled data to be used to better approximate the true domain shifts for meta-learning. Hence, the model can achieve better generalisation performance, especially when there is a limited amount of labeled data. Experiments show that the proposed method is robust on different segmentation tasks and achieves state-of-the-art generalisation performance on two public benchmarks. 将深度模型推广到来自新中心（此处称为域）的新数据仍然是一个挑战。这很大程度上归因于源域和未见域之间的数据统计变化（域转移）。最近，基于梯度的元学习方法（将训练数据分为元训练集和元测试集以模拟和处理训练期间的域转换）已显示出改进的泛化性能。然而，当前完全监督的元学习方法对于医学图像分割来说不可扩展，需要付出巨大的努力来创建像素级注释。同时，在低数据状态下，模拟的域移位可能无法很好地接近源域和未见域之间的真实域移位。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的具有解缠结的半监督元学习框架。我们明确地对与域转移相关的表示进行建模。解开表示并将它们组合起来重建输入图像，允许使用未标记的数据更好地近似元学习的真实域移位。因此，该模型可以获得更好的泛化性能，特别是当标记数据量有限时。实验表明，所提出的方法在不同的分割任务上具有鲁棒性，并且在两个公共基准上实现了最先进的泛化性能。 本文提出了一种结合解耦的半监督元学习框架，用于提高医疗图像分割的领域泛化能力。 Xiao Liu,Spyridon Thermos,Alison O'Neil,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris cs.CV

authors_text: Ofer Dagan,Nisar R. Ahmed
title: Factor Graphs for Heterogeneous Bayesian Decentralized Data Fusion
title_zh: 异构贝叶斯分散数据融合的因子图
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 1 table, submitted to the 24th International Conference on Information Fusion
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 1 table, submitted to the 24th International Conference on Information Fusion
abstract: This paper explores the use of factor graphs as an inference and analysis tool for Bayesian peer-to-peer decentralized data fusion. We propose a framework by which agents can each use local factor graphs to represent relevant partitions of a complex global joint probability distribution, thus allowing them to avoid reasoning over the entirety of a more complex model and saving communication as well as computation cost. This allows heterogeneous multi-robot systems to cooperate on a variety of real world, task oriented missions, where scalability and modularity are key. To develop the initial theory and analyze the limits of this approach, we focus our attention on static linear Gaussian systems in tree-structured networks and use Channel Filters (also represented by factor graphs) to explicitly track common information. We discuss how this representation can be used to describe various multi-robot applications and to design and analyze new heterogeneous data fusion algorithms. We validate our method in simulations of a multi-agent multi-target tracking and cooperative multi-agent mapping problems, and discuss the computation and communication gains of this approach.
summary: This paper explores the use of factor graphs as an inference and analysis tool for Bayesian peer-to-peer decentralized data fusion. We propose a framework by which agents can each use local factor graphs to represent relevant partitions of a complex global joint probability distribution, thus allowing them to avoid reasoning over the entirety of a more complex model and saving communication as well as computation cost. This allows heterogeneous multi-robot systems to cooperate on a variety of real world, task oriented missions, where scalability and modularity are key. To develop the initial theory and analyze the limits of this approach, we focus our attention on static linear Gaussian systems in tree-structured networks and use Channel Filters (also represented by factor graphs) to explicitly track common information. We discuss how this representation can be used to describe various multi-robot applications and to design and analyze new heterogeneous data fusion algorithms. We validate our method in simulations of a multi-agent multi-target tracking and cooperative multi-agent mapping problems, and discuss the computation and communication gains of this approach.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了使用因子图作为贝叶斯点对点分散数据融合的推理和分析工具。我们提出了一个框架，每个代理都可以使用局部因子图来表示复杂的全局联合概率分布的相关分区，从而使它们能够避免对整个更复杂的模型进行推理，并节省通信和计算成本。这使得异构多机器人系统能够在各种现实世界、面向任务的任务中进行合作，其中可扩展性和模块化是关键。为了发展初始理论并分析这种方法的局限性，我们将注意力集中在树结构网络中的静态线性高斯系统上，并使用通道滤波器（也由因子图表示）来显式跟踪公共信息。我们讨论如何使用这种表示来描述各种多机器人应用以及设计和分析新的异构数据融合算法。我们在多智能体多目标跟踪和协作多智能体映射问题的模拟中验证了我们的方法，并讨论了该方法的计算和通信增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因子图的异构贝叶斯去中心化数据融合框架，通过局部因子图分解全局概率分布以降低计算和通信成本。
AI.motivation: 传统中心化数据融合方法在复杂多机器人系统中存在计算开销大、通信瓶颈和可扩展性差的问题，需设计更高效的去中心化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建基于局部因子图的分布式框架，利用通道滤波器跟踪共享信息，并在树状网络结构中针对静态线性高斯系统进行理论分析与算法设计。
AI.result: 通过多智能体多目标跟踪和协作地图构建仿真验证了方法有效性，展示了计算复杂度和通信开销的显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为异构多机器人系统提供了可扩展、模块化的去中心化数据融合方案，在保持性能的同时提升了系统效率。

authors_text: C. Daniel Freeman,Erik Frey,Anton Raichuk,Sertan Girgin,Igor Mordatch,Olivier Bachem
title: Brax -- A Differentiable Physics Engine for Large Scale Rigid Body Simulation
title_zh: Brax——用于大规模刚体模拟的可微分物理引擎
comment: 9 pages + 12 pages of appendices and references. In submission at NeurIPS 2021 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
comments: 9 pages + 12 pages of appendices and references. In submission at NeurIPS 2021 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
abstract: We present Brax, an open source library for rigid body simulation with a focus on performance and parallelism on accelerators, written in JAX. We present results on a suite of tasks inspired by the existing reinforcement learning literature, but remade in our engine. Additionally, we provide reimplementations of PPO, SAC, ES, and direct policy optimization in JAX that compile alongside our environments, allowing the learning algorithm and the environment processing to occur on the same device, and to scale seamlessly on accelerators. Finally, we include notebooks that facilitate training of performant policies on common OpenAI Gym MuJoCo-like tasks in minutes.
summary: We present Brax, an open source library for rigid body simulation with a focus on performance and parallelism on accelerators, written in JAX. We present results on a suite of tasks inspired by the existing reinforcement learning literature, but remade in our engine. Additionally, we provide reimplementations of PPO, SAC, ES, and direct policy optimization in JAX that compile alongside our environments, allowing the learning algorithm and the environment processing to occur on the same device, and to scale seamlessly on accelerators. Finally, we include notebooks that facilitate training of performant policies on common OpenAI Gym MuJoCo-like tasks in minutes.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 Brax，这是一个用于刚体仿真的开源库，重点关注加速器的性能和并行性，用 JAX 编写。我们展示了一系列任务的结果，这些任务的灵感来自于现有的强化学习文献，但在我们的引擎中进行了重新设计。此外，我们在 JAX 中提供 PPO、SAC、ES 和直接策略优化的重新实现，这些优化与我们的环境一起编译，允许学习算法和环境处理在同一设备上进行，并在加速器上无缝扩展。最后，我们还提供了笔记本，可以在几分钟内对常见 OpenAI Gym MuJoCo 类任务的性能策略进行培训。

AI.tldr: 介绍Brax，一个基于JAX的高性能可微分物理引擎，用于大规模刚体模拟，并支持强化学习算法的高效实现。
AI.motivation: 现有物理模拟器在加速器上效率不足，难以支持大规模并行计算，且与强化学习算法集成不够紧密，需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于JAX构建可微分物理引擎，优化加速器并行计算，并集成多种强化学习算法，实现学习算法与环境处理的协同运行。
AI.result: 在多个强化学习任务中表现出色，能够快速训练出高性能策略，并有效利用加速器进行扩展。
AI.conclusion: Brax提供了高效、可扩展的物理模拟解决方案，结合强化学习算法，推动相关领域的研究和应用。

Finally, we include notebooks that facilitate training of performant policies on common OpenAI Gym MuJoCo-like tasks in minutes. 我们推出 Brax，这是一个用于刚体仿真的开源库，重点关注加速器的性能和并行性，用 JAX 编写。我们展示了一系列任务的结果，这些任务的灵感来自于现有的强化学习文献，但在我们的引擎中进行了重新设计。此外，我们在 JAX 中提供 PPO、SAC、ES 和直接策略优化的重新实现，这些优化与我们的环境一起编译，允许学习算法和环境处理在同一设备上进行，并在加速器上无缝扩展。最后，我们还提供了笔记本，可以在几分钟内对常见 OpenAI Gym MuJoCo 类任务的性能策略进行培训。 介绍Brax，一个基于JAX的高性能可微分物理引擎，用于大规模刚体模拟，并支持强化学习算法的高效实现。 C. Daniel Freeman,Erik Frey,Anton Raichuk,Sertan Girgin,Igor Mordatch,Olivier Bachem cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Katie Kang,Gregory Kahn,Sergey Levine
title: Hierarchically Integrated Models: Learning to Navigate from Heterogeneous Robots
title_zh: 分层集成模型：学习异构机器人导航
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning algorithms require large and diverse datasets in order to learn successful policies for perception-based mobile navigation. However, gathering such datasets with a single robot can be prohibitively expensive. Collecting data with multiple different robotic platforms with possibly different dynamics is a more scalable approach to large-scale data collection. But how can deep reinforcement learning algorithms leverage such heterogeneous datasets? In this work, we propose a deep reinforcement learning algorithm with hierarchically integrated models (HInt). At training time, HInt learns separate perception and dynamics models, and at test time, HInt integrates the two models in a hierarchical manner and plans actions with the integrated model. This method of planning with hierarchically integrated models allows the algorithm to train on datasets gathered by a variety of different platforms, while respecting the physical capabilities of the deployment robot at test time. Our mobile navigation experiments show that HInt outperforms conventional hierarchical policies and single-source approaches.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning algorithms require large and diverse datasets in order to learn successful policies for perception-based mobile navigation. However, gathering such datasets with a single robot can be prohibitively expensive. Collecting data with multiple different robotic platforms with possibly different dynamics is a more scalable approach to large-scale data collection. But how can deep reinforcement learning algorithms leverage such heterogeneous datasets? In this work, we propose a deep reinforcement learning algorithm with hierarchically integrated models (HInt). At training time, HInt learns separate perception and dynamics models, and at test time, HInt integrates the two models in a hierarchical manner and plans actions with the integrated model. This method of planning with hierarchically integrated models allows the algorithm to train on datasets gathered by a variety of different platforms, while respecting the physical capabilities of the deployment robot at test time. Our mobile navigation experiments show that HInt outperforms conventional hierarchical policies and single-source approaches.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习算法需要大量且多样化的数据集，以便学习基于感知的移动导航的成功策略。然而，用单个机器人收集此类数据集可能非常昂贵。使用可能具有不同动态的多个不同机器人平台收集数据是一种更具可扩展性的大规模数据收集方法。但是深度强化学习算法如何利用这种异构数据集呢？在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有层次集成模型（HInt）的深度强化学习算法。在训练时，HInt 学习单独的感知和动力学模型，在测试时，HInt 以分层方式集成这两个模型，并使用集成模型规划操作。这种使用分层集成模型进行规划的方法允许算法在各种不同平台收集的数据集上进行训练，同时在测试时尊重部署机器人的物理能力。我们的移动导航实验表明，HInt 优于传统的分层策略和单源方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HInt的深度强化学习算法，通过分层整合异构机器人数据集中的感知和动态模型，解决多平台数据收集成本高、导航策略泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统单机器人数据收集成本高昂，多平台异构数据集虽能提升数据规模，但现有算法难以有效利用其差异性，导致导航策略无法适配不同物理特性的部署机器人。
AI.method: 训练阶段独立学习感知模型和动态模型，测试阶段通过分层结构整合二者，结合部署机器人物理特性进行动作规划，实现跨平台数据的统一利用。
AI.result: 移动导航实验表明，HInt在成功率和路径效率上均优于传统分层策略及单一数据源训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层集成模型方法有效解决了异构机器人数据利用难题，为跨平台强化学习提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Anoop Cherian,Jue Wang
title: Generalized One-Class Learning Using Pairs of Complementary Classifiers
title_zh: 使用成对互补分类器的广义一类学习
comment: Accepted at Trans. PAMI. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1908.05884
comments: Accepted at Trans. PAMI. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1908.05884
abstract: One-class learning is the classic problem of fitting a model to the data for which annotations are available only for a single class. In this paper, we explore novel objectives for one-class learning, which we collectively refer to as Generalized One-class Discriminative Subspaces (GODS). Our key idea is to learn a pair of complementary classifiers to flexibly bound the one-class data distribution, where the data belongs to the positive half-space of one of the classifiers in the complementary pair and to the negative half-space of the other. To avoid redundancy while allowing non-linearity in the classifier decision surfaces, we propose to design each classifier as an orthonormal frame and seek to learn these frames via jointly optimizing for two conflicting objectives, namely: i) to minimize the distance between the two frames, and ii) to maximize the margin between the frames and the data. The learned orthonormal frames will thus characterize a piecewise linear decision surface that allows for efficient inference, while our objectives seek to bound the data within a minimal volume that maximizes the decision margin, thereby robustly capturing the data distribution. We explore several variants of our formulation under different constraints on the constituent classifiers, including kernelized feature maps. We demonstrate the empirical benefits of our approach via experiments on data from several applications in computer vision, such as anomaly detection in video sequences, human poses, and human activities. We also explore the generality and effectiveness of GODS for non-vision tasks via experiments on several UCI datasets, demonstrating state-of-the-art results.
summary: One-class learning is the classic problem of fitting a model to the data for which annotations are available only for a single class. In this paper, we explore novel objectives for one-class learning, which we collectively refer to as Generalized One-class Discriminative Subspaces (GODS). Our key idea is to learn a pair of complementary classifiers to flexibly bound the one-class data distribution, where the data belongs to the positive half-space of one of the classifiers in the complementary pair and to the negative half-space of the other. To avoid redundancy while allowing non-linearity in the classifier decision surfaces, we propose to design each classifier as an orthonormal frame and seek to learn these frames via jointly optimizing for two conflicting objectives, namely: i) to minimize the distance between the two frames, and ii) to maximize the margin between the frames and the data. The learned orthonormal frames will thus characterize a piecewise linear decision surface that allows for efficient inference, while our objectives seek to bound the data within a minimal volume that maximizes the decision margin, thereby robustly capturing the data distribution. We explore several variants of our formulation under different constraints on the constituent classifiers, including kernelized feature maps. We demonstrate the empirical benefits of our approach via experiments on data from several applications in computer vision, such as anomaly detection in video sequences, human poses, and human activities. We also explore the generality and effectiveness of GODS for non-vision tasks via experiments on several UCI datasets, demonstrating state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 一类学习是一个经典问题，将模型拟合到仅可用于单个类的注释的数据。在本文中，我们探索了一类学习的新目标，我们将其统称为广义一类判别子空间（GODS）。我们的关键思想是学习一对互补分类器来灵活地限制一类数据分布，其中数据属于互补对中一个分类器的正半空间，而属于另一个分类器的负半空间。为了避免冗余，同时允许分类器决策表面非线性，我们建议将每个分类器设计为正交框架，并寻求通过联合优化两个相互冲突的目标来学习这些框架，即：i）最小化两个框架之间的距离，ii）最大化框架和数据之间的余量。因此，学习到的正交框架将表征分段线性决策表面，该决策表面允许高效推理，而我们的目标寻求将数据限制在最大化决策余量的最小体积内，从而稳健地捕获数据分布。我们在构成分类器的不同约束下探索了我们的公式的几种变体，包括核化特征图。我们通过对计算机视觉中多个应用程序的数据进行实验，例如视频序列、人体姿势和人类活动中的异常检测，证明了我们的方法的经验优势。我们还通过在几个 UCI 数据集上进行实验来探索 GODS 对于非视觉任务的通用性和有效性，展示了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种广义一类学习方法GODS，通过学习互补分类器对来灵活界定单类数据分布，实现高效且鲁棒的数据建模。
AI.motivation: 传统单类学习方法在处理非线性分布或复杂数据时存在局限性，需设计更灵活的模型结构以提升对数据分布的适应能力与决策边界鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建正交基作为互补分类器，通过联合优化两个冲突目标（最小化基间距离与最大化基与数据边距），生成分段线性决策面，支持高效推理。
AI.result: 在视频异常检测、人体姿态及活动识别等视觉任务以及UCI数据集上均取得优于现有方法的实验结果，验证了方法的广泛适用性与先进性。
AI.conclusion: GODS方法通过互补分类器对的协同学习，在保持计算效率的同时有效捕捉数据分布，为单类学习提供了新的建模范式。

authors_text: Giorgos Kordopatis-Zilos,Christos Tzelepis,Symeon Papadopoulos,Ioannis Kompatsiaris,Ioannis Patras
title: DnS: Distill-and-Select for Efficient and Accurate Video Indexing and Retrieval
title_zh: DnS：提取和选择以实现高效、准确的视频索引和检索
comment: ef:International Journal of Computer Vision (2022)
comments: ef:International Journal of Computer Vision (2022)
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of high performance and computationally efficient content-based video retrieval in large-scale datasets. Current methods typically propose either: (i) fine-grained approaches employing spatio-temporal representations and similarity calculations, achieving high performance at a high computational cost or (ii) coarse-grained approaches representing/indexing videos as global vectors, where the spatio-temporal structure is lost, providing low performance but also having low computational cost. In this work, we propose a Knowledge Distillation framework, called Distill-and-Select (DnS), that starting from a well-performing fine-grained Teacher Network learns: a) Student Networks at different retrieval performance and computational efficiency trade-offs and b) a Selector Network that at test time rapidly directs samples to the appropriate student to maintain both high retrieval performance and high computational efficiency. We train several students with different architectures and arrive at different trade-offs of performance and efficiency, i.e., speed and storage requirements, including fine-grained students that store/index videos using binary representations. Importantly, the proposed scheme allows Knowledge Distillation in large, unlabelled datasets -- this leads to good students. We evaluate DnS on five public datasets on three different video retrieval tasks and demonstrate a) that our students achieve state-of-the-art performance in several cases and b) that the DnS framework provides an excellent trade-off between retrieval performance, computational speed, and storage space. In specific configurations, the proposed method achieves similar mAP with the teacher but is 20 times faster and requires 240 times less storage space. The collected dataset and implementation are publicly available: https://github.com/mever-team/distill-and-select.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of high performance and computationally efficient content-based video retrieval in large-scale datasets. Current methods typically propose either: (i) fine-grained approaches employing spatio-temporal representations and similarity calculations, achieving high performance at a high computational cost or (ii) coarse-grained approaches representing/indexing videos as global vectors, where the spatio-temporal structure is lost, providing low performance but also having low computational cost. In this work, we propose a Knowledge Distillation framework, called Distill-and-Select (DnS), that starting from a well-performing fine-grained Teacher Network learns: a) Student Networks at different retrieval performance and computational efficiency trade-offs and b) a Selector Network that at test time rapidly directs samples to the appropriate student to maintain both high retrieval performance and high computational efficiency. We train several students with different architectures and arrive at different trade-offs of performance and efficiency, i.e., speed and storage requirements, including fine-grained students that store/index videos using binary representations. Importantly, the proposed scheme allows Knowledge Distillation in large, unlabelled datasets -- this leads to good students. We evaluate DnS on five public datasets on three different video retrieval tasks and demonstrate a) that our students achieve state-of-the-art performance in several cases and b) that the DnS framework provides an excellent trade-off between retrieval performance, computational speed, and storage space. In specific configurations, the proposed method achieves similar mAP with the teacher but is 20 times faster and requires 240 times less storage space. The collected dataset and implementation are publicly available: https://github.com/mever-team/distill-and-select.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了大规模数据集中高性能和计算高效的基于内容的视频检索问题。当前的方法通常提出：（i）采用时空表示和相似性计算的细粒度方法，以高计算成本实现高性能，或（ii）将视频表示/索引为全局向量的粗粒度方法，其中时空结构丢失，提供低性能但也具有低计算成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个称为蒸馏和选择（DnS）的知识蒸馏框架，该框架从性能良好的细粒度教师网络开始学习：a）不同检索性能和计算效率权衡的学生网络，b）选择器网络，在测试时快速将样本定向到适当的学生，以保持高检索性能和高计算效率。我们训练了几名具有不同架构的学生，并在性能和效率（即速度和存储要求）上达成了不同的权衡，包括使用二进制表示存储/索引视频的细粒度学生。重要的是，所提出的方案允许在大型、未标记的数据集中进行知识蒸馏——这会产生优秀的学生。我们在三个不同视频检索任务的五个公共数据集上评估了 DnS，并证明：a）我们的学生在多种情况下实现了最先进的性能；b）DnS 框架在检索性能、计算速度和存储空间之间提供了出色的权衡。在特定配置中，所提出的方法实现了与教师相似的 mAP，但速度快了 20 倍，并且需要的存储空间减少了 240 倍。收集的数据集和实现是公开的：https://github.com/mever-team/distill-and-select。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DnS框架，通过知识蒸馏和选择机制实现高效准确的视频索引与检索。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索方法在计算效率与性能间存在矛盾：细粒度方法计算成本高，粗粒度方法性能差。需平衡两者以实现高效准确的检索。
AI.method: 构建知识蒸馏框架DnS，从高性能教师网络学习多个学生网络（不同性能-效率权衡）及选择器网络，测试时动态分配样本至最优学生，结合二值表示与未标注数据训练。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上实现SOTA性能，部分配置下较教师网络快20倍且存储需求降低240倍，兼顾检索性能、速度与存储效率。
AI.conclusion: DnS通过分层网络设计有效平衡性能与效率，为大规模视频检索提供可行方案，代码与数据集已开源。

authors_text: Parthasarathy Suryanarayanan,Prithwish Chakraborty,Piyush Madan,Kibichii Bore,William Ogallo,Rachita Chandra,Mohamed Ghalwash,Italo Buleje,Sekou Remy,Shilpa Mahatma,Pablo Meyer,Jianying Hu
title: Disease Progression Modeling Workbench 360
title_zh: 疾病进展建模工作台 360
comment: Submitted to OHDSI Collaborator Showcase, 2021 (https://www.ohdsi.org/2021-collaborator-showcase)
comments: Submitted to OHDSI Collaborator Showcase, 2021 (https://www.ohdsi.org/2021-collaborator-showcase)
abstract: In this work we introduce Disease Progression Modeling workbench 360 (DPM360) opensource clinical informatics framework for collaborative research and delivery of healthcare AI. DPM360, when fully developed, will manage the entire modeling life cycle, from data analysis (e.g., cohort identification) to machine learning algorithm development and prototyping. DPM360 augments the advantages of data model standardization and tooling (OMOP-CDM, Athena, ATLAS) provided by the widely-adopted OHDSI initiative with a powerful machine learning training framework, and a mechanism for rapid prototyping through automatic deployment of models as containerized services to a cloud environment.
summary: In this work we introduce Disease Progression Modeling workbench 360 (DPM360) opensource clinical informatics framework for collaborative research and delivery of healthcare AI. DPM360, when fully developed, will manage the entire modeling life cycle, from data analysis (e.g., cohort identification) to machine learning algorithm development and prototyping. DPM360 augments the advantages of data model standardization and tooling (OMOP-CDM, Athena, ATLAS) provided by the widely-adopted OHDSI initiative with a powerful machine learning training framework, and a mechanism for rapid prototyping through automatic deployment of models as containerized services to a cloud environment.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了疾病进展建模工作台 360 (DPM360) 开源临床信息学框架，用于协作研究和交付医疗保健人工智能。 DPM360 完全开发后，将管理整个建模生命周期，从数据分析（例如群组识别）到机器学习算法开发和原型设计。 DPM360 增强了广泛采用的 OHDSI 计划提供的数据模型标准化和工具（OMOP-CDM、Athena、ATLAS）的优势，具有强大的机器学习训练框架，以及通过将模型作为容器化服务自动部署到云环境来快速原型化的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个开源临床信息学框架DPM360，旨在管理疾病进展建模的全生命周期，从数据分析到机器学习算法开发，并结合标准化工具与云部署机制。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI研究缺乏统一的标准化工具与高效机器学习框架，需整合数据标准化优势与自动化模型部署能力以促进协作研究。
AI.method: 整合OHDSI倡议的标准化数据模型（如OMOP-CDM）与工具（Athena、ATLAS），开发机器学习训练框架，并通过容器化服务实现模型自动云部署。
AI.result: 构建完成DPM360框架，支持从队列识别到模型部署的全流程管理，提升疾病进展建模的效率与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DPM360通过标准化与自动化技术，为医疗AI研究提供了高效的协作平台，推动疾病进展建模的临床转化与应用。

authors_text: Eli Chien,Chao Pan,Jianhao Peng,Olgica Milenkovic
title: You are AllSet: A Multiset Function Framework for Hypergraph Neural Networks
title_zh: You are AllSet：超图神经网络的多重集函数框架
comment: ICLR 2022
comments: ICLR 2022
abstract: Hypergraphs are used to model higher-order interactions amongst agents and there exist many practically relevant instances of hypergraph datasets. To enable efficient processing of hypergraph-structured data, several hypergraph neural network platforms have been proposed for learning hypergraph properties and structure, with a special focus on node classification. However, almost all existing methods use heuristic propagation rules and offer suboptimal performance on many datasets. We propose AllSet, a new hypergraph neural network paradigm that represents a highly general framework for (hyper)graph neural networks and for the first time implements hypergraph neural network layers as compositions of two multiset functions that can be efficiently learned for each task and each dataset. Furthermore, AllSet draws on new connections between hypergraph neural networks and recent advances in deep learning of multiset functions. In particular, the proposed architecture utilizes Deep Sets and Set Transformer architectures that allow for significant modeling flexibility and offer high expressive power. To evaluate the performance of AllSet, we conduct the most extensive experiments to date involving ten known benchmarking datasets and three newly curated datasets that represent significant challenges for hypergraph node classification. The results demonstrate that AllSet has the unique ability to consistently either match or outperform all other hypergraph neural networks across the tested datasets.
summary: Hypergraphs are used to model higher-order interactions amongst agents and there exist many practically relevant instances of hypergraph datasets. To enable efficient processing of hypergraph-structured data, several hypergraph neural network platforms have been proposed for learning hypergraph properties and structure, with a special focus on node classification. However, almost all existing methods use heuristic propagation rules and offer suboptimal performance on many datasets. We propose AllSet, a new hypergraph neural network paradigm that represents a highly general framework for (hyper)graph neural networks and for the first time implements hypergraph neural network layers as compositions of two multiset functions that can be efficiently learned for each task and each dataset. Furthermore, AllSet draws on new connections between hypergraph neural networks and recent advances in deep learning of multiset functions. In particular, the proposed architecture utilizes Deep Sets and Set Transformer architectures that allow for significant modeling flexibility and offer high expressive power. To evaluate the performance of AllSet, we conduct the most extensive experiments to date involving ten known benchmarking datasets and three newly curated datasets that represent significant challenges for hypergraph node classification. The results demonstrate that AllSet has the unique ability to consistently either match or outperform all other hypergraph neural networks across the tested datasets.
abstract_zh: 超图用于对代理之间的高阶交互进行建模，并且存在许多实际相关的超图数据集实例。为了实现超图结构数据的高效处理，已经提出了几种超图神经网络平台来学习超图属性和结构，特别关注节点分类。然而，几乎所有现有方法都使用启发式传播规则，并且在许多数据集上提供次优性能。我们提出了 AllSet，一种新的超图神经网络范式，它代表了（超）图神经网络的高度通用框架，并且首次将超图神经网络层实现为两个多重集函数的组合，可以针对每个任务和每个数据集有效地学习这些函数。此外，AllSet 利用了超图神经网络与多重集函数深度学习的最新进展之间的新联系。特别是，所提出的架构利用了 Deep Sets 和 Set Transformer 架构，可以实现显着的建模灵活性并提供高表达能力。为了评估 AllSet 的性能，我们进行了迄今为止最广泛的实验，涉及十个已知的基准数据集和三个新整理的数据集，这些数据集代表了超图节点分类的重大挑战。结果表明，AllSet 具有独特的能力，可以在测试数据集中一致匹配或优于所有其他超图神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AllSet框架，通过多重集函数实现超图神经网络，解决现有方法在高阶交互建模中的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超图神经网络依赖启发式传播规则，在复杂高阶交互建模中表现次优，缺乏通用性强且可高效学习的框架。
AI.method: 设计AllSet架构，将超图神经网络层表示为可学习的多重集函数组合，整合Deep Sets与Set Transformer技术，提升模型表达能力与灵活性。
AI.result: 在10个基准数据集和3个新数据集上验证，AllSet在节点分类任务中稳定优于或匹配所有现有超图神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: AllSet通过理论创新与架构设计，为超图神经网络提供了通用高效的学习框架，显著提升了高阶交互建模能力。
